source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 坚定的; 忠实的 loyal and committed in attitude: steadfast support 坚定的支持 | a steadfast friend 坚贞不渝的朋友

headline.core_en: firm, loyal, and not changing in belief, support, or purpose

familiar_bridge.summary: steady 是“稳定的”，fast 在这里有“牢牢固定”的感觉；steadfast 就是立场、支持或忠诚稳稳不变。

core.main: steadfast 强调在压力、困难或时间变化中仍然坚持，不轻易动摇。

senses.label: 坚定忠实
senses.text: 形容信念、支持、承诺或人保持稳定可靠。

usage_groups.group_title: 信念、支持或忠诚保持不变
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 面对压力仍然坚定可靠。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 描述朋友、支持者、信念、承诺、立场。

examples.sentence: Her steadfast support helped the reform survive years of opposition.
examples.translation: 她坚定的支持帮助改革熬过了多年的反对。
examples.teaching_note: steadfast support 强调长期、不动摇的支持。

examples.sentence: The scientist remained steadfast in his belief that the data would eventually make sense.
examples.translation: 这位科学家始终坚信这些数据最终会得到解释。
examples.teaching_note: remain steadfast in 表示在信念上坚持不变。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: She gave a firm answer and refused to change her mind.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 她给出了坚定的回答，拒绝改变主意。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: firm 更普通；steadfast 更强调长期忠诚和稳定。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The leader was resolute in the face of criticism.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这位领导者面对批评仍然坚决。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: resolute 强调决心强；steadfast 强调持续不变。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The group showed unwavering dedication to the project.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个团体对项目表现出不动摇的投入。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: unwavering 与 steadfast 很接近，突出不摇摆。

antonyms.example_sentence: Fickle public opinion can turn against a leader quickly.
antonyms.example_translation: 反复无常的公众舆论可能很快转向反对某位领导人。
antonyms.difference_note: fickle 与 steadfast 的稳定忠诚相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: His wavering support made allies nervous.
antonyms.example_translation: 他摇摆不定的支持让盟友不安。
antonyms.difference_note: wavering 强调立场不稳。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The committee was stubborn even after the evidence changed.
confusable_words.example_translation: 即使证据改变，委员会仍然固执。
confusable_words.difference_note: stubborn 常贬义，指不愿改变；steadfast 通常强调值得肯定的坚定。

extension.root_affix: stead 与“稳定位置”有关；fast 有“牢固”的古义。steadfast 可理解为“稳稳固定住”。

word_family.note: 帮助理解 steadfast 的稳定感。

related_words.note: 帮助记住 fast 的“牢固”方向。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: steadfast 已建立 steady/fast 构词记忆，并把稳定忠诚与固执区分。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: v.t. ASE; 不理会; 公然违抗 to confront with assured power of resistance; disregard: defy public opinion 无视公众意见 i£ X44 disregard vt， 无法被 …; 使 … 不可能 (of a thing) make (an action or quality) almost impossible: His actions defy belief. 他的做法让人无法相信 。 | The paintings defy classification. 这些绘画无法分类

headline.core_en: to openly resist authority, or to be too difficult to explain or achieve

familiar_bridge.summary: defy 不只是 disobey。它有一种正面顶住权威、规则或预期的力量感。

core.main: defy 有两个重要方向：公然违抗权威或规则；某事太难，以至于“无法解释、无法相信、无法描述”。

senses.label: 公然违抗
senses.text: 面对命令、规则或权威，不服从并表现出抵抗。

senses.label: 难以解释或做到
senses.text: defy explanation / belief / description 表示超出常规解释能力。

usage_groups.group_title: 公开违抗权威或规则
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是偷偷不遵守，而是正面抵抗。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 法律、政治、纪律、权威命令语境。

examples.sentence: The protesters defied the ban and gathered in the square.
examples.translation: 抗议者无视禁令，在广场聚集。
examples.teaching_note: defy the ban/order 表示公然违抗。

usage_groups.group_title: 超出解释、预期或描述
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 困难或奇特到常规语言和逻辑难以处理。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 描述现象、成就、复杂性、景象或结果。

examples.sentence: The speed of the change seemed to defy explanation.
examples.translation: 这种变化的速度似乎难以解释。
examples.teaching_note: defy explanation 是阅读中常见抽象结构。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The child disobeyed the teacher's instructions.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 孩子没有服从老师的指令。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: disobey 可普通不服从；defy 更公开、更有对抗性。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The villagers resisted the new tax.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 村民抵制新税。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: resist 强调抵抗压力；defy 强调挑战权威或预期。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The company flouted safety regulations.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 公司公然无视安全规定。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: flout 常指轻蔑地无视规则。

antonyms.example_sentence: Citizens are expected to obey the law.
antonyms.example_translation: 公民应当遵守法律。
antonyms.difference_note: obey 是 defy 的直接反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: The factory complied with the new standards.
antonyms.example_translation: 工厂遵守了新标准。
antonyms.difference_note: comply with 常用于遵守规定。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The official denied the accusation.
confusable_words.example_translation: 官员否认了指控。
confusable_words.difference_note: deny 是否认事实；defy 是违抗或超出解释。

word_family.note: 形容词形式，表示态度上不服从。

related_words.note: 正式近义词，可与 defy 一起记。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: defy 已按违抗和难以解释两义处理，避免只讲 disregard。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 不遵守; AEE; 公然违抗 a refusal to obey something or someone: a defiance of tradition 违反传统

headline.core_en: open refusal to obey authority, rules, or expectations

familiar_bridge.summary: defiance 是 defy 的名词。它不是普通 disagreement，而是带有公开抵抗姿态的“不服”。

core.main: defiance 强调一种公开、坚定、不愿服从的态度，常针对权威、命令、规则或社会预期。

senses.label: 公然违抗
senses.text: 拒绝服从并表现出反抗姿态。

usage_groups.group_title: 面对权威或规则表现出反抗
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不愿服从，并且让别人看见这种不服。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治抗议、家庭冲突、纪律、法律、文学人物分析。

examples.sentence: Her refusal to apologize was seen as an act of defiance.
examples.translation: 她拒绝道歉被视为一种公然反抗。
examples.teaching_note: an act of defiance 表示具体的反抗行为。

examples.sentence: The newspaper published the report in defiance of government warnings.
examples.translation: 这家报纸无视政府警告，刊登了这篇报道。
examples.teaching_note: in defiance of 表示“公然不顾、违抗”。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The policy faced strong resistance from local groups.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这项政策遭到地方团体的强烈抵抗。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: resistance 范围宽；defiance 更强调公开不服从。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The officer was punished for insubordination.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这名军官因抗命受到惩罚。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: insubordination 常用于组织或军队中的下级抗命。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The rebellion began as a protest against taxes.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这场叛乱始于反税抗议。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: rebellion 规模更大，可能形成集体叛乱。

antonyms.example_sentence: The school valued obedience more than independent thought.
antonyms.example_translation: 学校更重视服从，而不是独立思考。
antonyms.difference_note: obedience 是 defiance 的直接反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: The treaty demanded complete submission.
antonyms.example_translation: 条约要求彻底屈服。
antonyms.difference_note: submission 强调放弃抵抗。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The lawyer prepared a strong defense.
confusable_words.example_translation: 律师准备了有力辩护。
confusable_words.difference_note: defense 是防御或辩护；defiance 是公然违抗。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: defiance 与 defy 词族自然衔接，in defiance of 结构已补充。

补充 defiant/insubordination

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. #2; 沉着 mental calmness, composure, and evenness of temper, especially in a difficult situation: She accepted both the good and the bad with equanimity. 不论好坏她都沉着接受

headline.core_en: calmness and emotional balance, especially under stress

familiar_bridge.summary: equal 有“平衡”的感觉，equanimity 就像情绪保持平衡，不被压力轻易拉偏。

core.main: equanimity 指人在困难、批评、危险或不确定中仍能保持冷静和情绪稳定。

senses.label: 沉着镇定
senses.text: 面对压力仍然保持平衡的心态。

usage_groups.group_title: 压力下保持冷静和平衡
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 情绪不被恐惧、愤怒或焦虑控制。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 评价人物性格、领导力、危机处理或哲学态度。

examples.sentence: She received the harsh criticism with remarkable equanimity.
examples.translation: 她以非常镇定的态度接受了严厉批评。
examples.teaching_note: with equanimity 表示面对压力仍平静。

examples.sentence: The leader's equanimity during the crisis reassured the public.
examples.translation: 领导人在危机中的沉着使公众感到安心。
examples.teaching_note: equanimity 常用于评价危机中的稳定心态。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: His calmness helped the group avoid panic.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他的冷静帮助团队避免恐慌。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: calmness 普通；equanimity 更正式，强调内在平衡。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: She kept her composure during the difficult interview.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 她在艰难面试中保持镇定。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: composure 与 equanimity 很近，常指外在表现出的沉着。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The speaker answered every question with poise.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 演讲者从容地回答了每个问题。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: poise 更强调优雅从容。

antonyms.example_sentence: The sudden news caused widespread agitation.
antonyms.example_translation: 突如其来的消息引发了普遍不安。
antonyms.difference_note: agitation 与 equanimity 的平静相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: Panic spread through the crowd.
antonyms.example_translation: 恐慌在人群中蔓延。
antonyms.difference_note: panic 是失去情绪平衡。

confusable_words.example_sentence: His indifference to the suffering around him shocked others.
confusable_words.example_translation: 他对周围痛苦的冷漠震惊了别人。
confusable_words.difference_note: equanimity 是有控制的冷静，不是冷漠。

extension.root_affix: equa- 与“平衡、相等”有关；anim 与“精神、心灵”有关。equanimity 可理解为“心保持平衡”。

word_family.note: 同含 anim 心理/精神方向，但现代意义不同。

related_words.note: 帮助记住 equa- 的平衡感。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: equanimity 的情绪平衡核心和词根记忆都已建立，并区分 indifference。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: v.i.&v.t. 传播 ( 思想等 ) spread or cause to spread over a wide area or among a large number of people: Technologies diffuse rapidly. 科技传播得很快 。 近义词 spread Vv.i.&v.t. 扩散 (气体 、 液体等 ); 使 ( 热 、 气味等 ) 四散 to spread out; to move freely throughout a large area: The colors of the sunset were diffused across the sky. 日落时分的霞光布满天空 。 adj. 分散的; 弥漫的; 范围广的 spread out over a large area; not concentrated: a diffuse community 一个分散的社区 | an organization which has become diffuse 一个业已松散的组织 adj. (文章等 ) 宛长的; 散乱的 lacking clarity or conciseness: a diffuse style THMW XK | a diffuse writer 行文散乱的作者派生 diffusion /drfgu:3an/ n. 扩散; 传播; 分散 the action of diffusing; the state of being diffused

headline.core_en: to spread widely, or to be spread out and unfocused

familiar_bridge.summary: fuse 有“流散、倒出”的影子；diffuse 的核心画面是东西向四周散开。

core.main: diffuse 作动词时是思想、光、气味等扩散；作形容词时可指光线柔和分散，也可指文章或论述散漫不集中。

senses.label: 扩散；传播
senses.text: 思想、信息、气味、光线等向广处散开。

senses.label: 散漫的；不集中的
senses.text: 形容表达或结构缺少焦点。

usage_groups.group_title: 思想、光线或气味向外扩散
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 从一点扩展到更大范围。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 科学、社会传播、视觉、气味语境。

examples.sentence: The idea gradually diffused through the scientific community.
examples.translation: 这个想法逐渐在科学界传播开来。
examples.teaching_note: diffuse through 表示在某个群体或空间中扩散。

examples.sentence: Clouds diffused the sunlight and softened the landscape.
examples.translation: 云层把阳光散开，使景色变得柔和。
examples.teaching_note: diffuse light 是光线分散的自然用法。

usage_groups.group_title: 表达或论述显得散漫
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 信息太分散，缺少清晰中心。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 评价文章、演讲、论证结构。

examples.sentence: The essay contains interesting observations, but its argument is too diffuse.
examples.translation: 这篇文章有一些有趣观察，但论证过于散漫。
examples.teaching_note: 形容词 diffuse 常批评写作缺少焦点。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The news spread quickly across the city.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 消息很快传遍全城。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: spread 普通；diffuse 更正式，可用于思想、光、气体等。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The organization disseminated health information online.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 该组织在线传播健康信息。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: disseminate 常指有意传播信息。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The crowd dispersed after the announcement.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 公告后人群散开了。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: disperse 强调分散开，常用于人群或粒子。

antonyms.example_sentence: The lens concentrates light onto a small point.
antonyms.example_translation: 镜头把光集中到一个小点上。
antonyms.difference_note: concentrate 是 diffuse 的扩散/散漫反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: The revised essay focuses on one clear claim.
antonyms.example_translation: 修改后的文章聚焦于一个明确论点。
antonyms.difference_note: focus 对应 diffuse 的不集中。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The negotiator helped defuse the tension.
confusable_words.example_translation: 谈判者帮助缓和了紧张局势。
confusable_words.difference_note: defuse 是拆除危险或缓和局势；diffuse 是扩散或散漫。

extension.root_affix: di-/dif- 有“分开”的感觉；fuse 与“流、倾倒”有关。diffuse 的画面是向外散开。

word_family.note: 名词形式，科学和社会语境都常见。

related_words.note: 形近易混，需要和 diffuse 分开。
信息传播语境的正式近义词。

revision_actions: 新增形容词义和写作评价语境
补充 diffusion/defuse

source.raw_ocr_text: n. 演讲;辩论 written or spoken communication or debate: the language of political discourse Big tit ie n. (正式的 ) 探讨; 论述 a formal discussion of a topic in speech or writing: The professor presented a lucid discourse on the art of translation. 这位教授提出了一篇有关翻译技巧的条理

headline.core_en: formal discussion or communication about a topic

familiar_bridge.summary: discussion 是“讨论”，discourse 更正式，常指一个领域里围绕某话题形成的公共讨论和表达方式。

core.main: discourse 可以指正式论述，也可以指政治、学术、社会中的“话语体系”，即人们如何谈论某个问题。

senses.label: 正式论述；讨论
senses.text: 书面或口头的系统讨论。

senses.label: 话语；话语体系
senses.text: 某领域中讨论问题的语言、概念和框架。

usage_groups.group_title: 正式讨论或论述某个主题
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 围绕一个议题进行较系统的表达。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 学术文章、演讲、哲学、政治讨论。

examples.sentence: The scandal changed the tone of public discourse about privacy.
examples.translation: 这起丑闻改变了公众关于隐私讨论的语气。
examples.teaching_note: public discourse 指公共空间中的讨论方式。

examples.sentence: The book traces how environmental discourse developed in the twentieth century.
examples.translation: 这本书追溯了二十世纪环境话语的发展。
examples.teaching_note: discourse 可以指某领域的语言和概念框架。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The discussion focused on education reform.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 讨论集中在教育改革上。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: discussion 普通；discourse 更正式、更系统。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The debate over immigration remains intense.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 关于移民的争论仍然激烈。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: debate 强调不同观点对立；discourse 可以更宽。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The conference encouraged dialogue between scientists and policymakers.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 会议鼓励科学家和政策制定者之间的对话。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: dialogue 强调双方或多方交流。

antonyms.example_sentence: The policy produced silence rather than open discussion.
antonyms.example_translation: 这项政策造成的是沉默，而不是公开讨论。
antonyms.difference_note: silence 与 discourse 的公开表达相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The decision created discord within the party.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这个决定在党内造成不和。
confusable_words.difference_note: discord 是不和；discourse 是讨论或话语。

extension.root_affix: course 有“运行、路线”的感觉；discourse 原本有思想或语言展开行进的意味。

word_family.note: 同族形容词，可指文章跳跃或论述展开。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: discourse 已处理正式论述和话语体系两层，清理旧 OCR 夹杂。

补充 public/political/academic discourse

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: #474) v.i. 聚集;集聚 come together and form a group or mass: Snow was collecting on the driveway. 路上积起了雪

headline.core_en: to gather things together, or to become calm and controlled

familiar_bridge.summary: collect 的核心是“把分散的东西聚到一起”。可以是收集物品，也可以是人群聚集，甚至是把自己的情绪收回来。

core.main: collect 是多义常用词：收集资料、聚集成群、收款领取，以及 collect oneself 表示恢复镇定。

senses.label: 收集
senses.text: 把分散的信息、物品或样本聚在一起。

senses.label: 聚集
senses.text: 人、云、水等逐渐聚成一团。

senses.label: 恢复镇定
senses.text: collect oneself 指把情绪控制回来。

usage_groups.group_title: 收集资料、物品或样本
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 把分散的东西集中起来。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 研究、收藏、调查、数据、样本。

examples.sentence: The researchers collected data from more than two thousand households.
examples.translation: 研究者从两千多个家庭收集了数据。
examples.teaching_note: collect data/evidence/samples 是学术语境高频结构。

usage_groups.group_title: 人或事物逐渐聚集
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 分散的东西汇到一处形成群体或团块。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 人群、云、水、灰尘、情绪等。

examples.sentence: A crowd collected outside the courthouse after the verdict.
examples.translation: 判决后，人群聚集在法院外。
examples.teaching_note: collect 作不及物动词时可表示人群聚集。

usage_groups.group_title: 让自己恢复镇定
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 把散乱的情绪或思绪收回控制住。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 紧张、惊讶、恐惧之后重新控制自己。

examples.sentence: She paused to collect her thoughts before answering the question.
examples.translation: 回答问题前，她停下来整理思绪。
examples.teaching_note: collect one's thoughts 是自然表达，不是字面收集。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The students gathered evidence for the debate.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 学生们为辩论收集证据。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: gather 和 collect 很近；collect 更强调有目的地集中。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Dust accumulated on the shelves.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 灰尘积在架子上。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: accumulate 强调逐渐增加。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The committee assembled a team of experts.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 委员会组建了一支专家团队。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: assemble 更强调把成员组织起来。

antonyms.example_sentence: The police scattered the crowd.
antonyms.example_translation: 警察驱散了人群。
antonyms.difference_note: scatter 与 collect 的聚集相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The crowd dispersed after the speech.
antonyms.example_translation: 演讲结束后人群散开。
antonyms.difference_note: disperse 更正式。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The assistant collated the survey responses.
confusable_words.example_translation: 助理整理并核对了调查回复。
confusable_words.difference_note: collate 是整理和核对资料；collect 是先把东西收集起来。

extension.root_affix: col-/com- 有“一起”的感觉；lect 与“选择、收取”有关。collect 的画面是把东西聚到一起。

word_family.note: 同族形容词，强调群体共同。

related_words.note: 同样和资料处理有关，但动作不同。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: collect 已处理收集、聚集、整理思绪三个核心义项，符合多义词标准。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj， 集体的; 共同的 done by people acting as a group: collective leadership 集体领导 | the collective interests of the society 社会的共同利益

headline.core_cn: 集体的；共同的；集体组织
headline.core_en: done or shared by a group; a group acting together

familiar_bridge.summary: collect 是“聚到一起”，collective 就是很多人作为一个整体行动或共享某种东西。

core.main: collective 强调群体共同完成、共同承担或共同拥有，而不是个人单独行动。

senses.label: 集体的；共同的
senses.text: 由群体一起完成或共享。

senses.label: 集体组织
senses.text: 作名词时指共同工作或共同拥有的团体。

usage_groups.group_title: 群体共同完成或承担
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 行动、责任、记忆或身份属于一个群体。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 社会、政治、组织、历史、心理语境。

examples.sentence: The crisis required collective action rather than isolated efforts.
examples.translation: 这场危机需要集体行动，而不是各自为战。
examples.teaching_note: collective action 是社会政治语境常见表达。

examples.sentence: The ceremony became part of the nation's collective memory.
examples.translation: 这个仪式成为该国集体记忆的一部分。
examples.teaching_note: collective memory 指群体共同保存的历史记忆。

usage_groups.group_title: 共同经营或拥有的团体
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 成员共同管理、工作或分享资源的组织。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 农业、艺术、政治、商业合作组织。

examples.sentence: The artists formed a collective to share studio space and exhibition costs.
examples.translation: 艺术家们组成一个集体，共享工作室空间和展览成本。
examples.teaching_note: collective 作名词时指共同运作的团体。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The two groups have a shared goal.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这两个群体有共同目标。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: shared 强调共同拥有；collective 强调群体整体性。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The village maintained communal gardens.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 村庄维护公共花园。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: communal 强调社区共享。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The project depends on cooperative planning.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个项目依赖合作规划。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: cooperative 强调合作方式。

antonyms.example_sentence: The award recognizes individual achievement.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个奖项表彰个人成就。
antonyms.difference_note: individual 与 collective 的群体性相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The land was converted from collective use to private ownership.
antonyms.example_translation: 这片土地从集体使用转为私人所有。
antonyms.difference_note: private 对应共同拥有的反向。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The collected essays were published in one volume.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这些收集起来的文章出版成一卷。
confusable_words.difference_note: collected 是 collect 的过去分词；collective 是群体共同的。

extension.root_affix: collective 来自 collect，核心是“聚到一起成为整体”。

related_words.note: 和 collective 常在社会语境中相近。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: collective 的形容词和名词义都已覆盖，和 collect 的词族关系自然。

revision_actions: 补充 collective action/memory 和 noun collective
区分 collective/collected

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: vt. Bok; 乞求; 请求 ask someone earnestly or anxiously to do something: J entreated him that he spare me this humiliation. ® X(t 4 2 RR ZA ALA. ~—|_ He entreated his boss for another chance. 他请求老板再给他一次机会

headline.core_en: to ask someone earnestly or anxiously to do something

familiar_bridge.summary: ask 是“请求”，beg 是“乞求”，entreat 更正式，强调真诚、急切地请求。

core.main: entreat 常用于文学或正式语境，表示带着恳切、焦虑或迫切感请求某人做事。

senses.label: 恳求；哀求
senses.text: 真诚而急切地请求。

usage_groups.group_title: 急切而真诚地请求某人
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 请求的语气比 ask 强，带有情感压力。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 文学叙事、正式请求、危急场面、道德劝说。

examples.sentence: The villagers entreated the officials to send help before the flood worsened.
examples.translation: 村民恳求官员在洪水恶化前派出援助。

examples.sentence: She entreated him not to abandon the project at its most difficult moment.
examples.translation: 她恳求他不要在项目最困难的时候放弃。
examples.teaching_note: entreat someone not to... 表示恳切劝阻。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: They begged the guard to open the gate.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他们恳求守卫打开大门。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: beg 更日常、更强烈；entreat 更正式或文学化。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The mother implored the judge for mercy.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 母亲恳求法官宽恕。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: implore 与 entreat 很接近，感情色彩强。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The letter beseeched readers to support the refugees.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这封信恳请读者支持难民。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: beseech 更古典或文学化。

antonyms.example_sentence: The union demanded higher wages.
antonyms.example_translation: 工会要求提高工资。
antonyms.difference_note: demand 是强硬要求；entreat 是恳切请求。

antonyms.example_sentence: The officer commanded the soldiers to stop.
antonyms.example_translation: 军官命令士兵停下。
antonyms.difference_note: command 来自权威，语气与 entreat 相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The doctor treated the wound carefully.
confusable_words.example_translation: 医生仔细处理伤口。
confusable_words.difference_note: treat 与 entreat 形近，但意义不同。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: entreat 已区分 ask/beg/demand，并补充正式文学语气。

revision_actions: 修正 headline
补充 entreaty/implore/beseech 网络
Reviewed usage_tree for natural semantic grouping and student-facing clarity.

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: #474) 4#. adj. (言语 ) 藏有言外之意的; 话里有话的 (of a word, statement, or question) charged with an underlying meaning or implication: a loaded question 意味深长的问题 | Avoid politically loaded terms like “ation ”避免使用 “民族 ”这样带有政治意味的词

headline.core_cn: 含有言外之意的；带偏向的；装满的
headline.core_en: carrying hidden meaning, bias, or a heavy load

familiar_bridge.summary: load 是“装载”。loaded 可以字面表示“装满的”，也可以说一个词或问题“装着”情绪、暗示或偏见。

core.main: 本单元重点是 loaded language/question：表面在说话，实际上带着情绪、预设或偏向。

senses.label: 含有言外之意的；带偏向的
senses.text: 词语、问题或说法暗含情绪、立场或预设。

senses.label: 装满的；负载的
senses.text: 字面表示装了很多东西。

usage_groups.group_title: 语言或问题带有暗示和偏向
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 说法里藏着情绪、评价或预设，容易影响听者判断。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治讨论、媒体语言、调查问题、争议性表达。

examples.sentence: The interviewer asked a loaded question that assumed the policy had already failed.
examples.translation: 采访者问了一个带有预设的问题，暗示这项政策已经失败。
examples.teaching_note: loaded question 常指问题本身不公平，因为里面藏着预设。

examples.sentence: The phrase became politically loaded after years of public debate.
examples.translation: 经过多年的公共争论，这个短语带上了政治意味。
examples.teaching_note: politically loaded 表示词语被政治情绪或立场包裹。

usage_groups.group_title: 字面上装满或负载很重
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 承载很多东西。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 车辆、武器、系统、容器等。

examples.sentence: A loaded truck moved slowly up the hill.
examples.translation: 一辆满载的卡车缓慢爬上山坡。
examples.teaching_note: 字面义较基础，但阅读中要和比喻义区分。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The report was biased in favor of the industry.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这份报告偏向该行业。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: biased 强调立场不公；loaded 强调语言本身带有预设或情绪。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The title is suggestive rather than explicit.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 标题是暗示性的，而不是明说的。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: suggestive 强调暗示；loaded 更常含偏向或情绪重量。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The debate took place in a highly charged atmosphere.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 辩论在情绪高度紧张的氛围中进行。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: charged 与 loaded 都可表示情绪浓重，charged 更强调气氛紧张。

antonyms.example_sentence: The survey used neutral wording to avoid influencing responses.
antonyms.example_translation: 调查使用中性措辞，以免影响回答。
antonyms.difference_note: neutral 是 loaded language 的理想反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: The study sought an unbiased measure of performance.
antonyms.example_translation: 研究试图找到不带偏见的表现衡量方式。
antonyms.difference_note: unbiased 强调没有偏向。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The article is loaded with technical terms.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这篇文章充满技术术语。
confusable_words.difference_note: loaded with 强调内容很多；loaded language 强调暗含偏向。

extension.root_affix: loaded 来自 load，核心是“装载”。比喻义就是语言里装着情绪、偏见或暗示。

word_family.note: 加 un- 后表示未装载或卸下。

related_words.note: 理解 loaded language 的关键概念。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: loaded 已把言外之意/偏向作为重点，同时保留字面装载义，适合学生辨析。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: vt， 资助; 捐赠 establish (a college post, annual prize, or project) by donating the funds needed to maintain it: endow a college 向一所大学捐赠基金 v.t. (通常作 be endowed with) 给予; 赋予 provide with a quality, ability, or asset: be endowed with courage 天生具有勇气 | endow these words with new significance 使这些词语增添新含 De 派生 endowment /in'daumont/ n. 捐款; 捐赠 the action of endowing something or someone: generous endowments 慷慨的捐赠

headline.core_en: to provide money for an institution, or to give someone a quality or ability

familiar_bridge.summary: donate 是“捐赠”，endow 更像捐一笔钱长期支持学校、职位、奖项；也可以表示“天生赋予某种品质”。

core.main: endow 有两个重要方向：用资金长期支持某个机构或项目；使某人或某物拥有某种能力、品质或特征。

senses.label: 捐资设立
senses.text: 提供资金，使职位、奖学金、项目或机构能够长期维持。

senses.label: 赋予
senses.text: 使某人拥有某种天赋、能力、权利或特质。

usage_groups.group_title: 捐资长期支持机构、职位或奖项
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是一次性小额捐赠，而是提供持续资金基础。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 大学、奖学金、讲席、基金会、博物馆。

examples.sentence: The donor endowed a scholarship for students from rural communities.
examples.translation: 捐赠者设立了一项面向农村社区学生的奖学金。
examples.teaching_note: endow a scholarship 表示捐资设立并长期支持。

usage_groups.group_title: 赋予能力、品质或权利
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 让某人或某物拥有某种特质。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 文学、哲学、政治、人物评价。

examples.sentence: The constitution endows citizens with certain basic rights.
examples.translation: 宪法赋予公民某些基本权利。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: They donated money to the hospital.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他们向医院捐了钱。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: donate 可一次性捐赠；endow 常指长期设立资金。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The grant funded the research for three years.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这笔拨款资助了研究三年。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: fund 强调提供资金；endow 常带长期基金基础。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The prize was bestowed on a young scientist.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 奖项授予了一位年轻科学家。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: bestow 对应 endow 的“赋予”义，语气更正式。

antonyms.example_sentence: The law stripped the agency of its authority.
antonyms.example_translation: 法律剥夺了该机构的权力。
antonyms.difference_note: strip of 与 endow with 方向相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The hero is endued with unusual courage.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这位英雄被赋予非凡勇气。
confusable_words.difference_note: endue 较古旧，与 endow 的赋予义相近但少用。

word_family.note: 既可指学校基金，也可指天生能力。
常见于 well-endowed institution / endowed with talent。

related_words.note: 与 endow 的资金语境相关。

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: endow 已覆盖捐资设立和赋予两义，资金语境与抽象赋予分清。

source.raw_ocr_text: n. 诽谤; 中伤 an attack on the reputation or integrity of someone or something: cast aspersions on sb. 造谣中伤某人近义词 slur

headline.core_en: a damaging remark that attacks someone's reputation

familiar_bridge.summary: attack a reputation 是“攻击名誉”；aspersion 就是这种损害名誉的说法，常用于 cast aspersions on。

core.main: aspersion 通常不指身体攻击，而是用话语损害某人的名誉、诚信或动机。

senses.label: 中伤；诽谤
senses.text: 暗示某人不诚实、不可靠或品格有问题。

usage_groups.group_title: 用言论损害他人名誉
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 把怀疑或负面评价投到某人品格上。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治争论、媒体批评、个人名誉、学术诚信。

examples.sentence: The article cast aspersions on the scientist's integrity without offering evidence.
examples.translation: 这篇文章在没有证据的情况下中伤了这位科学家的诚信。
examples.teaching_note: cast aspersions on 是 aspersion 最常见结构。

examples.sentence: She rejected the aspersion that her success depended on favoritism.
examples.translation: 她驳斥了那种说她的成功依赖偏袒的中伤。
examples.teaching_note: aspersion 常指针对品格或动机的负面暗示。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The comment was a direct insult.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这句话是直接侮辱。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: insult 可泛指侮辱；aspersion 更强调损害名誉。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The accusation amounted to slander.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这项指控构成了诽谤。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: slander 是法律和日常中的诽谤，通常指口头。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The pamphlet was full of calumny against the reformers.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这本小册子充满了对改革者的诬蔑。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: calumny 更书面，语气更重。

antonyms.example_sentence: The report offered praise for her honesty.
antonyms.example_translation: 报告赞扬了她的诚实。
antonyms.difference_note: praise 与 aspersion 的名誉攻击相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The officer received a commendation for bravery.
antonyms.example_translation: 这名军官因勇敢受到嘉奖。
antonyms.difference_note: commendation 是正式表扬。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The sudden change raised suspicion.
confusable_words.example_translation: 突然变化引起了怀疑。
confusable_words.difference_note: suspicion 是怀疑本身；aspersion 是损害名誉的说法。

related_words.note: cast aspersions on 中的固定动词。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: aspersion 已围绕名誉攻击和 cast aspersions on 建立清晰用法，未把短语塞进派生层。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 集体公用的; 公共的; 共同的 shared by all members of a community; for common use: a communal shower <= HE

headline.core_cn: 公共的；社区共享的；群体的
headline.core_en: shared by a community or used by members of a group

familiar_bridge.summary: community 是“社区”，communal 就是属于社区成员共同使用、共同参与或共同拥有的。

core.main: communal 强调群体共享或共同生活，常用于空间、资源、责任、生活方式或冲突。

senses.label: 公共共享的
senses.text: 社区或群体成员共同使用。

senses.label: 群体之间的
senses.text: 也可指不同宗教、族群或社区之间的关系。

usage_groups.group_title: 社区成员共同使用或参与
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 资源、空间或活动属于群体共享。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 住宅、厨房、土地、生活方式、社区活动。

examples.sentence: Residents share a communal garden behind the apartment building.
examples.translation: 居民共享公寓楼后面的公共花园。
examples.teaching_note: communal garden/land/kitchen 都强调共同使用。

usage_groups.group_title: 不同群体之间的关系或冲突
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 涉及宗教、族群或社区之间的互动。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 社会、政治、历史语境。

examples.sentence: The policy was designed to reduce communal tension in the region.
examples.translation: 这项政策旨在缓解该地区的群体间紧张。
examples.teaching_note: communal tension 不只是“公共紧张”，而是群体之间的紧张。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The students used a shared workspace.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 学生们使用共享工作区。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: shared 普通；communal 更强调社区或群体属性。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The crisis required collective action.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这场危机需要集体行动。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: collective 强调整体行动或责任；communal 强调社区共享或群体关系。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The village maintained common land for grazing.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 村庄保留公共牧地用于放牧。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: common 可表示共同拥有或常见；communal 更有社区感。

antonyms.example_sentence: The building has both private rooms and shared spaces.
antonyms.example_translation: 这栋楼既有私人房间，也有共享空间。
antonyms.difference_note: private 与 communal 的共享相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The plan balances communal needs with individual rights.
antonyms.example_translation: 该计划平衡群体需求与个人权利。
antonyms.difference_note: individual 强调个体。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The country adopted communist policies after the revolution.
confusable_words.example_translation: 革命后该国采用共产主义政策。
confusable_words.difference_note: communist 是政治意识形态；communal 是社区共享或群体性的。

extension.root_affix: commun- 与“共同、社区”有关。communal 的核心是 shared by a community。

word_family.note: 同属共同生活的语义场。

related_words.note: 与 communal 在群体语境中相近。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: communal 已分清共享空间和群体关系两义，避免只翻译公共。

source.raw_ocr_text: adj. ( 坏行为 ) 公然的; AEA AEHLNY (Of bad behavior) done openly and unashamedly: a blatant lie 弥天大谎 | blatant intrusion into a nation's internal affairs 对一国内政的公然干预

headline.core_en: done openly and without shame, especially when wrong or offensive

familiar_bridge.summary: obvious 是“明显”，blatant 是“坏得很明显，而且还不遮掩”。

core.main: blatant 常修饰错误、谎言、不公、偏见或违规行为，强调公开、刺眼、毫不羞愧。

senses.label: 明目张胆的
senses.text: 负面行为明显到无法忽视，而且做的人似乎不觉得羞耻。

usage_groups.group_title: 错误或不公明显且毫不遮掩
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 坏行为公开到刺眼。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 批评谎言、偏见、违规、歧视、不公、伪善。

examples.sentence: The policy was a blatant violation of the agreement.
examples.translation: 这项政策明目张胆地违反了协议。
examples.teaching_note: blatant violation 强调违规明显且不可辩解。

examples.sentence: The article exposed blatant bias in the selection process.
examples.translation: 文章揭露了选拔过程中的明显偏见。
examples.teaching_note: blatant bias 指偏见公开到很刺眼。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The mistake was obvious to everyone.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个错误对所有人都很明显。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: obvious 中性；blatant 常用于负面行为。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The official was accused of flagrant abuse of power.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这名官员被指控公然滥用权力。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: flagrant 与 blatant 很近，法律或道德谴责更强。

advanced_synonyms.meaning_cn: 厚颜无耻的；明目张胆的
advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The company made a brazen attempt to hide the evidence.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 公司厚颜无耻地试图隐藏证据。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: brazen 强调无耻和不害臊。

antonyms.example_sentence: The film makes a subtle criticism of consumer culture.
antonyms.example_translation: 电影对消费文化作出微妙批评。
antonyms.difference_note: subtle 与 blatant 的刺眼明显相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The report revealed a concealed conflict of interest.
antonyms.example_translation: 报告揭示了一项隐藏的利益冲突。
antonyms.difference_note: concealed 强调被隐藏。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The meaning of the sign was plain.
confusable_words.example_translation: 标志的含义很清楚。
confusable_words.difference_note: plain 可中性；blatant 几乎总有负面评价。

word_family.note: 副词形式，常说 blatantly false/unfair。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: blatant 已突出负面行为公开不遮掩的核心，并与 obvious/plain 区分。

source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 艰巨的;费力的; 困难的 involving or requiring strenuous effort; difficult and tiring: an arduous task 艰巨的任务 | arduous training 艰苦的训练 35034] taxing, strenuous, onerous, exacting

headline.core_en: difficult, tiring, and requiring sustained effort

familiar_bridge.summary: difficult 是“困难”，arduous 更强调耗费体力、精力或时间，像一段很长的 uphill work。

core.main: arduous 形容任务、旅程、过程或训练很难、很累，需要持续努力。

senses.label: 艰巨费力
senses.text: 既难又耗力，不是一下子能完成。

usage_groups.group_title: 任务或过程漫长而费力
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 需要持续努力、耐力和时间。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 工作、研究、训练、旅程、改革、谈判。

examples.sentence: Restoring the damaged manuscripts was an arduous task.
examples.translation: 修复受损手稿是一项艰巨任务。
examples.teaching_note: arduous task 强调耗时、费力、需要耐心。

examples.sentence: The reformers faced an arduous process of changing laws and public habits.
examples.translation: 改革者面临改变法律和公众习惯的艰巨过程。
examples.teaching_note: arduous process 常用于长期改革或研究。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The exam was difficult but fair.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 考试很难，但公平。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: difficult 范围广；arduous 强调费力和持续。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The archive required laborious classification.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 档案需要费力分类。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: laborious 强调工作繁重细致。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The doctor advised him to avoid strenuous exercise.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 医生建议他避免剧烈运动。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: strenuous 常偏体力强度。

antonyms.example_sentence: The first exercise was easy.
antonyms.example_translation: 第一道练习很容易。
antonyms.difference_note: easy 是 arduous 的基础反义。

antonyms.example_sentence: Her performance looked effortless.
antonyms.example_translation: 她的表演看起来毫不费力。
antonyms.difference_note: effortless 强调几乎不用努力。

confusable_words.example_sentence: He was an ardent supporter of the reform.
confusable_words.example_translation: 他是改革的热情支持者。
confusable_words.difference_note: ardent 是热情的；arduous 是艰巨的。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: arduous 已突出持续费力感，并与 difficult/strenuous/laborious 区分。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: v.t. (usher sth. in) 创始; 开辟 cause or mark the start of something new: When was the information age ushered in? 信息时代是什么时候开始的 ? | THe French Revolution ushered ina new age. 法国大革命开创了一个新时代

headline.core_cn: 引领；开启； usher in 开创
headline.core_en: to lead someone somewhere, or to mark the beginning of a new period

familiar_bridge.summary: usher 作名词可以是“引座员”；作动词时是把人带进去。usher in 抽象化后就是“把一个新时代带进来”。

core.main: usher 有字面和比喻两层：引导某人进入某处；usher in 表示标志或开启一个新时期。

senses.label: 引领；引导
senses.text: 把某人带到座位、房间或某处。

senses.label: 开启；引入
senses.text: usher in a new era 表示开创新阶段。

usage_groups.group_title: 引导某人进入某处
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 带路、引座或引入房间。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 剧院、会议、正式场合。

examples.sentence: An attendant ushered the guests into the hall.
examples.translation: 一名工作人员把客人引入大厅。
examples.teaching_note: usher someone into 表示把人引进某处。

usage_groups.group_title: 标志新时代或新阶段的开始
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 某事把一个新时期带来。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 历史、科技、政治、文化变化。

examples.sentence: The invention of printing helped usher in a new era of mass communication.
examples.translation: 印刷术的发明帮助开启了大众传播的新时代。
examples.teaching_note: usher in a new era 是高频抽象结构。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The guide led visitors through the museum.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 导游带领游客参观博物馆。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: lead 普通；usher 更有正式引导或引入的感觉。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The law introduced new safety standards.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 法律引入了新的安全标准。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: introduce 对应 usher in 的引入义。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The project inaugurated a period of rapid growth.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个项目开启了一段快速增长期。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: inaugurate 更正式，强调正式开启。

antonyms.example_sentence: The agreement ended years of conflict.
antonyms.example_translation: 协议结束了多年的冲突。
antonyms.difference_note: end 与 usher in 的开启相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The guards ushered the audience out after the event.
confusable_words.example_translation: 活动结束后，安保人员引导观众离场。
confusable_words.difference_note: usher out 是带出；usher in 是引入或开启。

word_family.note: 名词形式，帮助理解带路义。
过去分词形式，可用于字面或比喻语境。

related_words.note: 正式近义词，常与 era/period 搭配。

移除普通短语 usher in，避免派生层污染

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. i; 保护色 the disguising especially of military equipment or installations with paint, nets, or foliage; also the disguise so applied: commandos with sprigs of bushes fastened to their hats for camouflage effect 在帽子上扎着树枝作为伪装的突击队员们 | the camouflage of Q chameleon 变色龙的保护色

headline.core_en: a way of hiding something by making it look like its surroundings

familiar_bridge.summary: hide 是“隐藏”，camouflage 更像让东西融入背景，使人看不出来。

core.main: camouflage 可以是军事或动物的保护色，也可以比喻把真实动机、问题或身份掩盖起来。

senses.label: 伪装；保护色
senses.text: 通过颜色、图案或外观让物体不容易被发现。

senses.label: 掩饰
senses.text: 用表面现象遮住真实意图或问题。

usage_groups.group_title: 通过外观融入背景
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 让目标不易被发现。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 军事、动物、自然、服装、视觉设计。

examples.sentence: The insect's green body provides effective camouflage among the leaves.
examples.translation: 这种昆虫绿色的身体在叶子间提供了有效伪装。
examples.teaching_note: natural camouflage 指自然界保护色。

usage_groups.group_title: 用表面说法掩盖真实目的
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 外表看似合理，实际是在遮掩。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治语言、商业策略、个人动机、社会批评。

examples.sentence: The official explanation merely camouflaged the government's reluctance to act.
examples.translation: 官方解释只是掩盖了政府不愿行动的事实。
examples.teaching_note: camouflage 可作动词，比喻掩盖真实动机。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The spy used a disguise to enter the building.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 间谍用伪装进入大楼。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: disguise 强调改变外表或身份；camouflage 强调融入背景而不被发现。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The strategy depended on the concealment of key information.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 该策略依赖于关键信息的隐藏。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: concealment 是泛指隐藏；camouflage 是一种具体或比喻的隐藏方式。

antonyms.example_sentence: The exposure of the scheme ended the campaign.
antonyms.example_translation: 这一计划被揭露后，运动结束了。
antonyms.difference_note: exposure 与 camouflage 的隐藏相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The revelation changed public opinion overnight.
antonyms.example_translation: 这一披露一夜之间改变了公众舆论。
antonyms.difference_note: revelation 强调真相被揭开。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The camouflaged vehicle was hard to see from the air.
confusable_words.example_translation: 伪装过的车辆从空中很难看见。
confusable_words.difference_note: camouflaged 是形容词或过去分词，camouflage 可作名词或动词。

word_family.note: 较少见，历史上指军事伪装人员。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: camouflage 已覆盖自然/军事保护色和抽象掩饰，避免只讲原书军事义。

revision_actions: 新增 metaphorical concealment 用法
补充 disguise/concealment/exposure

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 忽视; #7 an unintentional failure to notice or do something: whether by oversight or intention 不管出于疏忽还是有意 | The mistake was the result of an oversight. K#iRER A 造成的

headline.core_en: an unintentional failure to notice something, or supervision

familiar_bridge.summary: over + sight 可以有两种方向：看漏了，所以是“疏忽”；从上面看管，所以是“监督”。

core.main: oversight 是典型反义式多义词：既可以指没注意到的错误，也可以指监督管理。语境决定意思。

senses.label: 疏忽；遗漏
senses.text: 无意中没看见、没做或没注意。

senses.label: 监督；监管
senses.text: 对机构、项目或权力进行检查和管理。

usage_groups.group_title: 无意中漏看或漏做
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是故意，而是疏忽造成遗漏。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 邮件、报告、流程、行政错误。

examples.sentence: The missing citation was a minor oversight, not plagiarism.
examples.translation: 缺失的引用只是一个小疏忽，不是抄袭。
examples.teaching_note: minor oversight 表示无意的小错误。

usage_groups.group_title: 对机构或项目进行监督
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 检查、监管、确保权力或流程不失控。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政府、董事会、委员会、项目管理。

examples.sentence: The agency operates with little independent oversight.
examples.translation: 这个机构几乎没有独立监管。
examples.teaching_note: oversight 在这里是 supervision，不是疏忽。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The mistake was corrected before publication.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 错误在出版前被纠正。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: mistake 范围广；oversight 常是无意漏看。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The project requires careful supervision.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个项目需要仔细监督。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: supervision 对应 oversight 的监管义。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The omission of key evidence weakened the argument.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 关键证据的遗漏削弱了论证。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: omission 强调漏掉某物；oversight 可强调无意疏忽。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The proposal came under public scrutiny.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这项提案受到公众审查。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: scrutiny 强调仔细检查，接近监管义。

antonyms.example_sentence: The problem needs immediate attention.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个问题需要立即关注。
antonyms.difference_note: attention 与疏忽义相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The building suffered from years of neglect.
antonyms.example_translation: 这栋建筑多年无人照管而受损。
antonyms.difference_note: neglect 可是长期忽视，不一定无意。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The committee oversees the budget.
confusable_words.example_translation: 委员会监督预算。
confusable_words.difference_note: oversee 只有监管义；oversight 还可表示疏忽。

extension.root_affix: over + sight 的双重意象很重要：看漏是疏忽，从上方看管是监督。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: oversight 已按疏忽/监督两个相反方向处理，是多义词深审标准样例。
issues_found: 旧释义只给忽视义，漏掉监管义
revision_actions: 新增 oversight committee/government oversight
补充 oversee/overseer

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 有帝王风范的; 威严的; 豪华的 of, resembling, or fit for a monarch, especially in being magnificent or dignified: a judge with a shrewd regal face HARE TRE HEF

headline.core_en: like a king or queen, especially dignified or magnificent

familiar_bridge.summary: royal 是“王室的”，regal 更偏“像国王或女王那样威严、华贵”。

core.main: regal 常形容气质、姿态、建筑、服饰或场面具有王者般的庄严和华丽。

senses.label: 帝王般的；威严华贵的
senses.text: 带有高贵、庄重、宏伟的视觉或气质。

usage_groups.group_title: 气质、姿态或场面像王室一样庄重
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 高贵、威严、华丽。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 人物姿态、建筑、服饰、仪式、动物形象。

examples.sentence: The old lion moved with a regal dignity that silenced the crowd.
examples.translation: 那头老狮子带着帝王般的威严移动，使人群安静下来。
examples.teaching_note: regal dignity 强调姿态上的王者气质。

examples.sentence: The palace was restored to its former regal splendor.
examples.translation: 宫殿被修复到昔日的皇家华美。
examples.teaching_note: regal splendor 常用于建筑或仪式的华丽感。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The royal family attended the ceremony.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 王室成员参加了仪式。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: royal 可指真实王室；regal 多指像王者一样的气质。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The mountains looked majestic at sunrise.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 日出时群山显得雄伟庄严。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: majestic 可形容自然或建筑的宏伟，不一定有王室感。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The procession moved at a stately pace.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 队伍以庄严的步伐前进。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: stately 强调庄重、从容。

antonyms.example_sentence: They lived in a humble cottage.
antonyms.example_translation: 他们住在一间朴素的小屋里。
antonyms.difference_note: humble 与 regal 的华贵威严相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The room was plain but comfortable.
antonyms.example_translation: 房间朴素但舒适。
antonyms.difference_note: plain 强调没有华丽装饰。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The contract is legally valid.
confusable_words.example_translation: 合同在法律上有效。
confusable_words.difference_note: legal 与 regal 只差首字母，意义完全不同。

extension.root_affix: reg- 与“统治、国王”有关；regal 带有王者气质。

word_family.note: 同属统治语义场，但意义不同。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: regal 的王者气质和 reg- 统治语义场已充分展开。

加入 regalia/regent/regime

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. (说话 ) 轻率的; 不加思考的 said or done too easily or carelessly; showing little preparation or thought: glib answers to difficult questions 对于困难问题的轻率答复

headline.core_cn: 油嘴滑舌的；轻率流畅的
headline.core_en: speaking smoothly but too easily, without enough thought or sincerity

familiar_bridge.summary: fluent 是“流利”，glib 表面也很顺，但问题是太顺了，显得没认真想或不真诚。

core.main: glib 常批评回答、解释或人说话太轻巧、太圆滑，缺少深度、诚意或责任感。

senses.label: 轻率流畅；油嘴滑舌
senses.text: 说得很顺，却显得浅薄或不真诚。

usage_groups.group_title: 回答或解释太顺滑而缺少诚意
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 语言流畅，但让人觉得敷衍、浅薄或不可靠。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 批评政治发言、道歉、销售话术、学生回答、公众解释。

examples.sentence: The minister gave a glib answer to a question about poverty.
examples.translation: 部长对贫困问题给出了一个轻率圆滑的回答。
examples.teaching_note: glib answer 常暗示回答太容易、太表面。

examples.sentence: The company's glib assurances did little to calm worried customers.
examples.translation: 公司油滑的保证几乎没有安抚担心的顾客。
examples.teaching_note: glib assurances 表示听起来顺耳但缺乏可信度。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The smooth-talking salesman avoided every difficult question.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个能说会道的销售避开了每个难题。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: smooth-talking 更口语；glib 更简洁正式。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The essay offers a facile solution to a complex problem.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这篇文章为复杂问题提供了轻率的解决方案。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: facile 强调解决或解释过于简单；glib 强调说话太顺而浅。

advanced_synonyms.meaning_cn: 圆滑的；花哨而不真诚的
advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The campaign's slick message concealed its lack of substance.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 竞选活动圆滑的口号掩盖了内容空洞。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: slick 更强调包装精美但可能不诚实。

antonyms.example_sentence: She gave a thoughtful response to the criticism.
antonyms.example_translation: 她对批评作出了深思熟虑的回应。
antonyms.difference_note: thoughtful 与 glib 的轻率相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: His apology sounded sincere.
antonyms.example_translation: 他的道歉听起来很真诚。
antonyms.difference_note: sincere 与 glib 的不真诚相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: She is fluent in three languages.
confusable_words.example_translation: 她能流利使用三种语言。
confusable_words.difference_note: fluent 是中性或褒义的流利；glib 是贬义的过于顺滑。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: glib 已准确区分 fluent 和 smooth but shallow，不再只是“不加思考”。

加入 facile/slick/fluent 辨析

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. (故事等的 ) 悬念 a quality in a work of fiction that arouses excited expectation or uncertainty about what may happen: a tale of suspense 充满悬念的故事

headline.core_en: a feeling of excited uncertainty about what will happen next

familiar_bridge.summary: suspend 是“悬着、暂停”，suspense 就像结局被悬在那里，让人紧张地等。

core.main: suspense 常用于故事、电影、戏剧或现实局势中，强调结果未定带来的紧张期待。

senses.label: 悬念
senses.text: 不知道接下来会发生什么，因此感到紧张或期待。

usage_groups.group_title: 故事或局势让人紧张等待结果
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 结局未揭晓，读者或观众被吊住。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 小说、电影、戏剧、比赛、政治或法律结果。

examples.sentence: The author builds suspense by revealing only fragments of the truth.
examples.translation: 作者只揭示真相的碎片，从而制造悬念。
examples.teaching_note: build suspense 是文学评论中很自然的表达。

examples.sentence: The trial held the nation in suspense for weeks.
examples.translation: 这场审判让全国民众数周都处于紧张期待中。
examples.teaching_note: hold someone in suspense 表示让人悬着心等待结果。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The silence created tension in the room.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 沉默在房间里制造了紧张感。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: tension 可泛指紧张；suspense 特别强调结果未知。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The audience waited in anticipation for the final scene.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 观众期待着最后一幕。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: anticipation 可正面期待；suspense 更紧张。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Uncertainty about the election affected the market.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 选举的不确定性影响了市场。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: uncertainty 是状态；suspense 是由不确定带来的紧张期待。

antonyms.example_sentence: The evidence gave the researchers certainty about the result.
antonyms.example_translation: 证据让研究者确定了结果。
antonyms.difference_note: certainty 消除了 suspense。

antonyms.example_sentence: The final chapter provides resolution to the mystery.
antonyms.example_translation: 最后一章揭开了谜团。
antonyms.difference_note: resolution 是悬念被解除。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The suspension of the project surprised everyone.
confusable_words.example_translation: 项目暂停让所有人惊讶。
confusable_words.difference_note: suspension 是暂停或悬挂；suspense 是悬念。

extension.root_affix: suspense 与 suspend 同源，带有“悬着、未落定”的意象。

word_family.note: 帮助理解 suspense 的“悬着未定”。

related_words.note: 与 suspense 常一起出现在叙事分析中。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: suspense 的悬而未决意象和叙事用法清楚，词族迁移自然。

revision_actions: 补充 create/build/hold in suspense
加入 suspend/suspenseful/suspension

source.raw_ocr_text: v.t， 具体说明 mention or describe particularly; treat individually or in detail: Would you particularize the items on the bill? 请你把账单逐项列出来好吗 ? 9 particularity /pattkju'larety n. 具体; 详细; 详尽 fullness or minuteness of detail in the treatment of something: She described the scene with great particularity. 她事无巨细地描述当时的景象

headline.core_en: to describe something in detail or treat items individually

familiar_bridge.summary: particular 是“具体的、特定的”，particularize 就是把笼统内容拆开，具体到每一项。

core.main: particularize 强调从总说走向细节，逐项说明、具体列出或分别处理。

senses.label: 具体说明
senses.text: 把笼统说法变成详细、具体的说明。

senses.label: 逐项列明
senses.text: 把账单、清单、条件等一项项列出来。

usage_groups.group_title: 把笼统内容具体化
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 补充细节，让说法不再空泛。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 写作、报告、法律文件、账单、清单。

examples.sentence: The lawyer asked the witness to particularize the dates and locations of the meetings.
examples.translation: 律师要求证人具体说明会议的日期和地点。
examples.teaching_note: particularize 常用于要求补充具体细节。

examples.sentence: A good proposal should particularize costs rather than offer a vague estimate.
examples.translation: 好的提案应逐项列明成本，而不是给出含糊估算。
examples.teaching_note: particularize costs/items 表示逐项说明。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The form asks applicants to specify their research interests.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 表格要求申请人具体说明研究兴趣。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: specify 更常用；particularize 更强调细节化和逐项处理。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The invoice itemized the materials and labor costs.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 发票逐项列出了材料和人工成本。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: itemize 特别适合账单、清单；particularize 范围更宽。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The report enumerates the causes of the decline.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 报告列举了衰退的原因。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: enumerate 强调按项列出。

antonyms.example_sentence: It is risky to generalize from one example.
antonyms.example_translation: 从一个例子进行概括是有风险的。
antonyms.difference_note: generalize 是从细节到概括，方向相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The study focuses on a particular region.
confusable_words.example_translation: 研究关注一个特定地区。
confusable_words.difference_note: particular 是形容词；particularize 是动词。

extension.root_affix: particular 表示“具体的、特定的”；-ize 构成动词，表示“使……具体化”。

related_words.note: 帮助理解 particular 的近义方向。
账单或清单语境非常接近。

source.raw_ocr_text: #474 ESL adv. 格外; 非常 to a higher degree than is usual or average: J don't particularly want to be reminded of that time. 我不是特别喜欢听人提起那个时候 。 adv. 尤其; 尤其是 used to single out a subject to which a statement is especially applicable: The team's defense is excellent, particularly their two center backs. 这支球队的防守组非常强悍 ， 龙其是他们的两个中卫

headline.core_en: especially, or more than usual

familiar_bridge.summary: particular 是“特定的”，particularly 就是在一堆情况中特别指出某一个，或表示程度格外高。

core.main: particularly 既可表示“尤其是”，突出某个对象；也可表示“非常、格外”，加强程度。

senses.label: 尤其；特别是
senses.text: 从多个对象中突出一个。

senses.label: 格外；非常
senses.text: 表示程度高于一般。

usage_groups.group_title: 突出某个对象或方面
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 在一组事物中强调某一个。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 解释重点、补充限定、写作衔接。

examples.sentence: The policy affected small businesses, particularly those in rural areas.
examples.translation: 这项政策影响了小企业，尤其是农村地区的小企业。
examples.teaching_note: particularly those... 用来突出某一类对象。

usage_groups.group_title: 表示程度格外高
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 比平常更明显、更强。

examples.sentence: The final chapter is particularly useful for understanding the author's argument.
examples.translation: 最后一章对理解作者论证格外有用。
examples.teaching_note: particularly useful 表示程度加强。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The course is useful, especially for beginners.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这门课很有用，尤其对初学者。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: especially 与 particularly 最接近，particularly 稍正式。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Several countries, notably Japan and Germany, changed their energy policies.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 几个国家，尤其是日本和德国，改变了能源政策。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: notably 常用于列举中特别指出。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The results improved markedly after the training.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 培训后结果显著改善。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: markedly 强调程度明显，不等于 especially。

antonyms.example_sentence: The method is generally reliable.
antonyms.example_translation: 这种方法总体上可靠。
antonyms.difference_note: generally 强调整体，particularly 强调特定。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The argument depends on one particular assumption.
confusable_words.example_translation: 该论证依赖一个特定假设。
confusable_words.difference_note: particular 是形容词；particularly 是副词。

extension.root_affix: particular + -ly 构成副词。它的核心仍是“指出特定对象”。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: #474 vt， 控制; 限制; 约束 to exert control over; regulate or limit toward a desired end: He's not able to manage his emotions. 他控制不住自己的感情 。 v.i， 成功做到; 成功达成 〈 尤指困难的事 ) succeed in doing, achieving, or producing (something, especially something difficult): Beth finally managed to hail a cab. 贝丝终于叫到了出租车 。 派生 manageable /maenrd5sbl/ adj. 容易处理的; 容易对付的 able to be managed, controlled, or accomplished without great difficulty: manageable problems 容易处理的问题 jx unmanageable /,an'mznidgabl/ adj. 难以处理的; 无法处理的; 无法掌控的 difficult or impossible to manage, manipulate, or control: unmanageable children 管不了的小孩

headline.core_en: to control or organize something, or succeed in doing something difficult

familiar_bridge.summary: manage 不只是“管理公司”。它也常表示在困难情况下“设法做到”。

core.main: manage 有三条常用线：管理或组织；控制情绪/风险/资源；manage to do 表示勉强或成功做到。

senses.label: 管理；组织
senses.text: 负责人员、项目、资源或机构。

senses.label: 控制；处理
senses.text: 控制情绪、风险、疾病、时间等。

senses.label: 设法做到
senses.text: manage to do 表示在困难中完成。

usage_groups.group_title: 管理人、项目或资源
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 组织并负责运行。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 公司、项目、团队、预算、资源。

examples.sentence: She manages a team that studies urban poverty.
examples.translation: 她管理一个研究城市贫困的团队。
examples.teaching_note: manage a team/project 是基础管理义。

usage_groups.group_title: 控制问题、风险或情绪
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 让困难情况不失控。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 风险、疾病、情绪、时间、冲突。

examples.sentence: The policy helped farmers manage the risk of drought.
examples.translation: 这项政策帮助农民控制干旱风险。
examples.teaching_note: manage risk 表示控制而非完全消除风险。

usage_groups.group_title: 在困难中设法做到
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 虽然不容易，但最终完成。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 日常叙述、任务完成、克服困难。

examples.sentence: Despite limited funding, the researchers managed to complete the survey.
examples.translation: 尽管经费有限，研究者还是设法完成了调查。
examples.teaching_note: manage to do 强调有困难但成功完成。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The medication helps control pain.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这种药有助于控制疼痛。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: control 对应 manage 的处理/控制义。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: He runs a small bookstore.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他经营一家小书店。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: run 更口语，常指经营机构。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The agency administers the scholarship program.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 该机构管理奖学金项目。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: administer 更正式，常指制度或项目管理。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The committee oversees the budget.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 委员会监督预算。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: oversee 强调监督而不一定亲自执行。

antonyms.example_sentence: The fund was mismanaged for years.
antonyms.example_translation: 这笔基金多年管理不善。
antonyms.difference_note: mismanage 是 manage 的负面反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: The team failed to meet the deadline.
antonyms.example_translation: 团队未能按时完成。
antonyms.difference_note: fail 与 manage to do 的成功做到相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The manager approved the budget.
confusable_words.example_translation: 经理批准了预算。
confusable_words.difference_note: manager 是人；manage 是动作。

word_family.note: 表示问题或任务能被处理。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

source.raw_ocr_text: #474) 4X n. (公司等的 ) 管理层 the people in charge of running a company or organization, regarded collectively: Management was extremely cooperative. 管理层非常合作

headline.core_en: the act of managing, or the people who run an organization

familiar_bridge.summary: manage 是“管理、处理”，management 可以指管理这件事，也可以指公司里的管理层。

core.main: management 常见两义：管理过程和方法；管理层这一群人。阅读中要看它是在说 skill/process 还是 people in charge。

senses.label: 管理；处理
senses.text: 组织资源、人员、风险或问题的过程。

senses.label: 管理层
senses.text: 公司或机构中负责决策和运行的人。

usage_groups.group_title: 管理过程、方法或能力
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 如何组织、控制和处理资源或问题。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 项目、风险、时间、资源、疾病、危机。

examples.sentence: Effective water management is essential in dry regions.
examples.translation: 在干旱地区，有效的水资源管理至关重要。
examples.teaching_note: management 在这里指管理过程和方法。

usage_groups.group_title: 公司或机构的管理层
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 负责决策和运营的一群人。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 公司、学校、组织、劳资关系。

examples.sentence: The workers accused management of ignoring safety concerns.
examples.translation: 工人指责管理层忽视安全问题。
examples.teaching_note: management 在这里指管理层，而不是抽象管理。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The administration changed the rules for admission.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 行政部门改变了录取规则。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: administration 更偏行政管理或政府/学校管理层。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Good governance requires transparency.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 良好治理需要透明度。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: governance 更宏观，常用于制度、公司或国家治理。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The project needs closer supervision.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个项目需要更密切的监督。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: supervision 是管理中的监督环节。

antonyms.example_sentence: The crisis was worsened by years of mismanagement.
antonyms.example_translation: 多年管理不善加剧了危机。
antonyms.difference_note: mismanagement 是 management 的失败形式。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The manager met with the staff.
confusable_words.example_translation: 经理会见了员工。
confusable_words.difference_note: manager 是个人；management 可以是过程或管理层整体。

extension.root_affix: management 来自 manage，-ment 构成名词，表示动作、过程或结果。

word_family.note: 加 mis- 表示管理失败。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 偶尔的; 断断续续的; 零散的 occurring occasionally, singly, or in irregular or random instances: The candidate's speech was interrupted by sporadic applause. 候选人的演说被零堆落落的掌声所打断 。 派生 sporadically /spou'redikali/ adv. 偶尔地; 断断续续地;零散地 occasionally or at irregular intervals: the distant thunder from the coast continued sporadically 远处海岸边不时传 RAE

headline.core_en: happening occasionally and irregularly, not continuously

familiar_bridge.summary: occasional 是“偶尔的”，sporadic 更强调零散、不规律，像这里一下那里一下。

core.main: sporadic 用来形容事件、掌声、暴力、病例、通信等不连续、不稳定地出现。

senses.label: 零星断续
senses.text: 偶尔发生，且没有稳定规律。

usage_groups.group_title: 事件或活动零星出现
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是持续发生，而是偶尔、断断续续地出现。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 掌声、暴力、病例、雨、通信、努力。

examples.sentence: The speech was interrupted by sporadic applause from the back of the room.
examples.translation: 演讲被房间后排零星的掌声打断。
examples.teaching_note: sporadic applause 是的自然表达。

examples.sentence: The region has seen sporadic outbreaks of the disease.
examples.translation: 该地区出现过零星的疾病暴发。
examples.teaching_note: sporadic outbreaks 强调发生不连续、不规律。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The city receives occasional snow in winter.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这座城市冬天偶尔下雪。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: occasional 只是偶尔；sporadic 更强调零散和无规律。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The machine made an intermittent noise.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 机器发出断断续续的噪音。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: intermittent 强调时断时续，常比 sporadic 更有节奏。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Scattered protests occurred across the country.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 全国各地发生了零散抗议。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: scattered 强调空间上分散。

antonyms.example_sentence: The system requires continuous monitoring.
antonyms.example_translation: 该系统需要持续监测。
antonyms.difference_note: continuous 与 sporadic 的断续相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: Regular exercise improved his health.
antonyms.example_translation: 规律锻炼改善了他的健康。
antonyms.difference_note: regular 强调有规律。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The audience gave a spontaneous cheer.
confusable_words.example_translation: 观众自发欢呼。
confusable_words.difference_note: spontaneous 是未经安排自发发生；sporadic 是零星不规律。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

source.raw_ocr_text: n. 功绩; 成就; 英勇事迹 an achievement that requires great courage, skill, or strength: a heroic feat 英雄业绩 | a brilliant feat of engineering 光辉的工程成就

headline.core_en: an impressive achievement requiring skill, strength, or courage

familiar_bridge.summary: achievement 是“成就”，feat 更强调这个成就不容易，需要技巧、勇气或力量。

core.main: feat 常用于赞叹某件事做成很不容易，如工程、体力、智力、组织或艺术上的高难度成就。

senses.label: 壮举；难得成就
senses.text: 需要能力、勇气或努力才完成的事。

usage_groups.group_title: 完成高难度成就
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 事情本身困难，因此完成后显得了不起。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 工程、运动、科学、组织、艺术、智力挑战。

examples.sentence: Building the bridge in such a remote area was a remarkable feat of engineering.
examples.translation: 在如此偏远的地区建桥是一项非凡的工程壮举。
examples.teaching_note: feat of engineering 是高频结构。

examples.sentence: Finishing the translation in one week was no small feat.
examples.translation: 一周内完成翻译绝非易事。
examples.teaching_note: no small feat 表示“很了不起”。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: Graduating early was a major achievement.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 提前毕业是一项重大成就。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: achievement 范围广；feat 更强调难度和惊叹感。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The discovery was a major scientific accomplishment.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这一发现是一项重大科学成就。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: accomplishment 更正式，可指完成的成果。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The general's exploits became legendary.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 将军的英勇事迹成了传奇。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: exploit 作名词时常带冒险或英勇色彩。

antonyms.example_sentence: The mission ended in failure.
antonyms.example_translation: 任务以失败告终。
antonyms.difference_note: failure 与 feat 的成功成就相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The table is six feet long.
confusable_words.example_translation: 桌子长六英尺。
confusable_words.difference_note: feet 与 feat 发音相同，但意义完全不同。

related_words.note: 更有冒险色彩的近义词。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: feat 已围绕高难度成就组织，no small feat 和 feat of engineering 自然。

revision_actions: 补充 no small feat/feat of engineering
加入 feet 易混

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj， 全部包含在内的; 全面的; 范围大的 including a wide range of people, things, ideas, etc.: Dance is not as inclusive an art as literature. 舞蹈不像文学那么全面 。 i044) generic, comprehensive

headline.core_en: including many kinds of people or things, or not excluding anyone

familiar_bridge.summary: include 是“包括”，inclusive 就是“把更多人或东西包括进来”，既可指范围全，也可指态度包容。

core.main: inclusive 有两个常见方向：范围上包含很多内容；社会态度上不排斥不同群体。

senses.label: 包含广泛的
senses.text: 范围大，把相关内容都算进去。

senses.label: 包容的
senses.text: 欢迎不同背景、身份或观点的人参与。

usage_groups.group_title: 范围覆盖得广
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 把多种对象、时间或条件都包括在内。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 日期、费用、列表、政策范围、研究样本。

examples.sentence: The price is inclusive of taxes and service fees.
examples.translation: 这个价格包含税费和服务费。
examples.teaching_note: inclusive of 表示包含在内。

usage_groups.group_title: 让不同群体都能参与
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不排斥少数群体或不同背景的人。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 教育、职场、政策、语言、社会价值。

examples.sentence: The school adopted more inclusive policies for students with disabilities.
examples.translation: 学校为残障学生采用了更包容的政策。
examples.teaching_note: inclusive policy 强调不把某些群体排除在外。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The fee covers all materials, including textbooks.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 费用涵盖所有材料，包括教材。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: including 是介词/分词；inclusive 是形容词。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The report offers a comprehensive review of the evidence.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 报告对证据作了全面回顾。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: comprehensive 强调内容全面；inclusive 强调纳入范围广或包容。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The movement became more embracing of different traditions.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这场运动更加包容不同传统。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: embracing 更强调接纳态度。

antonyms.example_sentence: The club was criticized for its exclusive membership rules.
antonyms.example_translation: 俱乐部因排他的会员规则受到批评。
antonyms.difference_note: exclusive 是 inclusive 的直接反义。

antonyms.example_sentence: The policy was challenged as exclusionary.
antonyms.example_translation: 这项政策因具有排斥性而受到质疑。
antonyms.difference_note: exclusionary 强调制度上排除某些人。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The evidence was not conclusive.
confusable_words.example_translation: 证据并不确凿。
confusable_words.difference_note: conclusive 与 inclusive 形近，但表示结论确凿。

extension.root_affix: in- 表示“进入、包含”；clus 与“关闭、关入”有关。inclusive 的画面是把人或物纳入范围。

word_family.note: ex- 表示向外，方向相反。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. A; 打算; 计划 the underlying intentions or motives of a particular person or group: She has no hidden agenda. 她没有秘密计划 。 | Miller has his own agenda and it has nothing to do with football. K¥#4 A th A CAR, AUR IRAAR AR.

headline.core_en: a list of things to discuss, or an underlying plan or motive

familiar_bridge.summary: agenda 最直观是会议的“议程”；在阅读里也常指一个人或群体背后的目标、立场或隐藏动机。

core.main: agenda 有两条常用线：公开列出的会议事项；不一定明说的政治、个人或组织意图。

senses.label: 议程
senses.text: 会议或讨论中要处理的事项清单。

senses.label: 意图；计划
senses.text: 某人或群体想推进的目标，有时带隐藏意味。

usage_groups.group_title: 会议或讨论的议程
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 需要讨论或处理的事项清单。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 会议、委员会、组织流程。

examples.sentence: Climate policy was placed at the top of the conference agenda.
examples.translation: 气候政策被放在会议议程的首位。
examples.teaching_note: on/at the top of the agenda 是自然表达。

usage_groups.group_title: 背后的目标或隐藏意图
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 某人或组织试图推动的立场、利益或计划。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治、媒体、学术批评、社会运动。

examples.sentence: The article accuses the group of using science to advance a political agenda.
examples.translation: 文章指责该团体利用科学来推进政治议程。
examples.teaching_note: advance an agenda 表示推动某种目标或立场。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The mayor announced a plan to reduce traffic.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 市长宣布了一项减少交通拥堵的计划。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: plan 范围广；agenda 常含会议事项或政治目标。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The party presented a program of economic reform.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 该党提出了一套经济改革纲领。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: program 更正式，常指一整套行动方案。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The detective questioned the suspect's motive.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 侦探质疑嫌疑人的动机。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: motive 对应 agenda 的隐藏意图方向。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The meeting was added to her calendar.
confusable_words.example_translation: 会议被加入她的日程表。
confusable_words.difference_note: calendar 是时间安排；agenda 是讨论事项或目标。

extension.root_affix: agenda 原本与“要做的事情”有关；现代用法保留了任务清单和目标计划的感觉。

related_words.note: 政治传播中常见，指决定公众讨论什么。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: agenda 已覆盖会议议程和隐藏目标两义，特别补足 GRE 阅读常见的 political agenda。
issues_found: 旧中文有 OCR 乱码且只给意图义
revision_actions: 新增 meeting agenda 和 hidden/political agenda
补充 agenda-setting

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj， 乐天的; 乐观的 optimistic or positive, especially in an apparently bad or difficult situation: a sanguine happy-go-lucky disposition 5% ® i 2% th te =| The commander was sanguine about the superiority of his airmen. 司令官对属下飞行员的优势抱乐观态度 。 近又词 heartened RA sanguinity /seen'gwimoti/ n. 乐天; 乐观 the quality or state of being optimistic: He looks at the future with sanguinity. 他对前途抱乐观态度

headline.core_en: optimistic or confident, especially in a difficult situation

familiar_bridge.summary: optimistic 是“乐观”，sanguine 更正式，常形容人在困难或不确定中仍保持信心。

core.main: sanguine 并不是普通开心，而是在前景不明或情况不佳时仍然乐观。

senses.label: 乐观有信心
senses.text: 面对困难、风险或不确定，仍相信结果会好。

usage_groups.group_title: 困难中仍保持乐观
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 即使形势不明朗，也相信结果会改善。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 经济、政治、研究、商业、个人前景。

examples.sentence: Economists were less sanguine about the recovery than the government was.
examples.translation: 经济学家对复苏并不像政府那样乐观。
examples.teaching_note: sanguine about 表示对某事乐观。

examples.sentence: The author warns that the reformers may be too sanguine about human nature.
examples.translation: 作者警告说，改革者可能对人性过于乐观。
examples.teaching_note: too/overly sanguine 常带批评，表示乐观过头。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: She is optimistic about the future.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 她对未来很乐观。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: optimistic 最常用；sanguine 更正式，常用于分析语境。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The early results made the team hopeful.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 早期结果让团队抱有希望。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: hopeful 更温和；sanguine 更像稳定的信心。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The market remained buoyant despite the bad news.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 尽管有坏消息，市场仍保持乐观活跃。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: buoyant 常形容情绪或市场有活力。

antonyms.example_sentence: Analysts were pessimistic about the company's prospects.
antonyms.example_translation: 分析师对公司的前景感到悲观。
antonyms.difference_note: pessimistic 是 sanguine 的直接反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: After repeated failures, the team grew despondent.
antonyms.example_translation: 反复失败后，团队变得沮丧。
antonyms.difference_note: despondent 强调失去希望。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The book describes a sanguinary battle.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这本书描写了一场血腥战斗。
confusable_words.difference_note: sanguinary 与 blood 有关；sanguine 在现代常指乐观。

extension.root_affix: sanguin- 与 blood 有关。古代气质理论中“血液充足”被认为性格乐观，所以 sanguine 发展出乐观义。

word_family.note: 同源但意义不同，常见于战争描写。
较专业，帮助看出 blood 词源。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: sanguine 已解释乐观义和 blood 词源之间的关系，并补充 overly sanguine 的批评用法。
issues_found: 旧释义可用但缺少 too/overly sanguine 和词源迁移
revision_actions: 重写 usage_tree
补充 sanguinary/sanguineous

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. lig; 忽略 the act or an instance of omitting something; omission: elision of useless subplots 把毫无用处的支线情节省略掉 i 44] lacuna

headline.core_en: the omission of a sound, word, or detail

familiar_bridge.summary: omit 是“省略”，elision 更正式，常指语言中音、词或叙述细节被省去。

core.main: elision 强调某个本该出现的部分被省略，可以是发音里的音节，也可以是文章、历史叙述中的重要细节。

senses.label: 语言中的省音或省略
senses.text: 发音、词语或句子成分被省去。

senses.label: 叙述中的删略
senses.text: 把复杂或关键细节略过，使表达更简短但可能不完整。

usage_groups.group_title: 语言或文本中省去某个部分
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 声音、词或细节被删掉。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 语言学、写作、编辑、叙事分析。

examples.sentence: The poem relies on the elision of small connecting words to create speed.
examples.translation: 这首诗通过省略小的连接词来制造速度感。
examples.teaching_note: elision 在语言和文学分析中常表示有意删略。

examples.sentence: The historian criticizes the film's elision of the workers' role in the strike.
examples.translation: 历史学家批评这部电影省略了工人在罢工中的作用。
examples.teaching_note: 叙述中的 elision 可能影响读者理解历史或责任。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The omission of key facts weakened the report.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 关键事实的遗漏削弱了报告。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: omission 更常用；elision 更书面，常带语言或叙事分析色彩。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The abridgment removed several historical digressions.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 删节本删除了几段历史旁枝。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: abridgment 强调缩短文本。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The sentence uses ellipsis to avoid repetition.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个句子使用省略来避免重复。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: ellipsis 更偏语法结构或省略号。

antonyms.example_sentence: The inclusion of eyewitness accounts made the history more vivid.
antonyms.example_translation: 纳入目击者叙述让这段历史更生动。
antonyms.difference_note: inclusion 与 elision 的省去相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The addition of one example clarified the argument.
antonyms.example_translation: 增加一个例子让论证更清楚。
antonyms.difference_note: addition 是增加内容。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The painting creates the illusion of depth.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这幅画制造出深度错觉。
confusable_words.difference_note: illusion 是错觉；elision 是省略。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.
