source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 虚假; 虚伪; 假装 an attempt to make something that is not the case appear true: make a pretense of affection 假装多情 | be devoid of all pretense EARLE

headline.core_en: an attempt to make something false appear true

familiar_bridge.summary: pretend 是“假装”，pretense 就是假装出来的表面样子或借口。

core.main: pretense 强调用表面说法或行为掩盖真实情况，可以是装出来的身份、态度，也可以是做某事的借口。

senses.label: 假装；伪装
senses.text: 让不真实的东西看起来真实。

senses.label: 借口；托词
senses.text: 用表面理由掩盖真正目的。

usage_groups.group_title: 装出某种样子或态度
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 表面形象与真实情况不一致。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 人物性格、社会礼仪、政治姿态、文学分析。

examples.sentence: The official spoke under the pretense of neutrality while defending his own party.
examples.translation: 这名官员表面上中立，实际上却在为自己的政党辩护。
examples.teaching_note: under the pretense of 表示“打着……的幌子”。

examples.sentence: Her kindness was genuine, not a pretense meant to win approval.
examples.translation: 她的善意是真诚的，不是为了获得认可而装出来的。
examples.teaching_note: pretense 可指虚假的姿态。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: His politeness was only pretending.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他的礼貌只是装出来的。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: pretending 更口语；pretense 是名词，更书面。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The election was dismissed as a sham.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这场选举被认为是一场骗局。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: sham 更强，暗示彻底虚假。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: His accent was an affectation, not his natural speech.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 他的口音是装出来的，不是自然说话方式。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: affectation 强调装出来的姿态或风格。

antonyms.example_sentence: Her sincerity made the apology convincing.
antonyms.example_translation: 她的真诚让道歉有说服力。
antonyms.difference_note: sincerity 与 pretense 的假装相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The memoir's authenticity was widely praised.
antonyms.example_translation: 这本回忆录的真实性广受赞扬。
antonyms.difference_note: authenticity 强调真实可信。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The police used the noise complaint as a pretext to enter the building.
confusable_words.example_translation: 警方以噪音投诉为借口进入大楼。
confusable_words.difference_note: pretext 更强调行动借口；pretense 更强调虚假表象。

extension.root_affix: pretense 与 pretend 同族，核心是“把不真实的东西呈现出来”。

word_family.note: 同族形容词，强调为了显得重要而装。

related_words.note: 和 pretense 在“表面理由”上接近，但用途不同。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj， 装模作样的; 装腔作势的;自命不凡的 trying to appear important, intelligent, etc. in order to impress other people; trying to be something that you are not, in order to impress: use pretentious language {# J¥ 3 Re (EH IE Se 3# pretension /pri'tenfan/ n. 自负; 浮夸; 装腔作势 vanity, pretentiousness: He finds human foibles endearing, but is unforgiving of pretension. 他觉得人性的弱点很可爱 ， 但不能容芒悍悍作态 。 派生 unpretentious /Anprrtenfas/ adj. 不装腔作势的; 不张扬的 not attempting to impress others with an appearance of greater importance, talent, or culture than is actually possessed: She was caustically brilliant, yet totally loyal, unpretentious, human and tolerant. 她非常有才华 ， 绝对患诚可靠 ， 而且毫不做作 ， 有人情味和宽容心

headline.core_cn: 装腔作势的；自命不凡的
headline.core_en: trying to seem more important, cultured, or impressive than one really is

familiar_bridge.summary: pretend 是“假装”，pretentious 就是为了显得高级、聪明或重要而装出来。

core.main: pretentious 批评人、语言、艺术或风格故意显得深奥、高雅或重要，但实际不自然或空洞。

senses.label: 装腔作势；自命不凡
senses.text: 外表追求高雅或重要，给人不真诚、过度包装的感觉。

usage_groups.group_title: 风格或语言故意显得高级
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 刻意装出有文化、有深度或很重要的样子。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 评价文章、艺术、建筑、餐厅、谈吐、人物姿态。

examples.sentence: The essay uses pretentious language to hide a simple argument.
examples.translation: 这篇文章用装腔作势的语言掩盖一个简单论点。
examples.teaching_note: pretentious language 常批评用词故意显得高级。

examples.sentence: The restaurant's decor felt pretentious rather than elegant.
examples.translation: 这家餐厅的装潢让人觉得装腔作势，而不是优雅。
examples.teaching_note: pretentious 与 elegant 的区别在于是否自然、有实质。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The design was showy but not practical.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个设计很花哨，但不实用。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: showy 强调外表炫；pretentious 强调装出高雅或重要。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: His affected accent made the speech sound false.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 他做作的口音让演讲听起来不真。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: affected 强调不自然地装出来。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The official's pompous speech annoyed the audience.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 官员浮夸自大的演讲惹恼了听众。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: pompous 更强调自大和官腔。

antonyms.example_sentence: The building is modest but beautifully designed.
antonyms.example_translation: 这栋建筑朴素但设计优美。
antonyms.difference_note: modest 与 pretentious 的张扬装饰相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The cafe is small and unpretentious.
antonyms.example_translation: 这家咖啡馆小而朴实。
antonyms.difference_note: unpretentious 是直接反义。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The project is ambitious but carefully planned.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这个项目雄心很大，但规划周密。
confusable_words.difference_note: ambitious 不一定负面；pretentious 是装出来的高级感。

extension.root_affix: pretentious 来自 pretense/pretend，核心是“做出不真实的姿态”。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: pretentious 已突出装出来的高级感，并与 ambitious/elegant 区分。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: #444 X n. (文学 、 艺术等 ) 突破传统; 不遵守传统 a writer's or artist's freedom to deviate from facts or accepted conventions: artistic license 艺术上的突破传统 n. (区指做坏事的 ) 自由; 理由 (a license to do something) a reason or excuse to do something wrong or excessive: She regards her illness as a license to treat other people badly. 她觉得自己生病了就可以对其他人态度不好

headline.core_en: official permission, or freedom to depart from rules or facts

familiar_bridge.summary: permission 是“允许”，license 是更正式的许可或执照；在文学艺术里，它也表示创作者偏离事实或常规的自由。

core.main: license 有两条常用线：官方许可或执照；艺术、写作中的自由发挥。

senses.label: 许可；执照
senses.text: 官方允许某人做某事的权利或文件。

senses.label: 艺术自由；突破常规
senses.text: 作者或艺术家为了表达效果偏离事实或规则。

usage_groups.group_title: 官方允许或颁发执照
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 获得合法从事某事的许可。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 驾驶、经营、广播、专业资格、软件使用。

examples.sentence: The company needs a license to operate in the region.
examples.translation: 这家公司需要执照才能在该地区经营。
examples.teaching_note: license to operate 表示官方许可。

usage_groups.group_title: 创作中有意偏离事实或传统
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 为了艺术效果，不完全遵守事实、语法或传统规范。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 文学、电影、诗歌、历史改编、艺术评论。

examples.sentence: The film takes considerable artistic license with the historical record.
examples.translation: 这部电影对历史记录进行了相当多的艺术改编。
examples.teaching_note: artistic license 是创作自由，不是错误地乱写。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: You need permission to enter the archive.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 进入档案馆需要许可。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: permission 普通；license 更正式，可指法律文件。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The project cannot begin without official authorization.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 没有官方授权，项目不能开始。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: authorization 强调正式批准。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The novelist took liberties with the chronology.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 小说家对时间顺序作了自由处理。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: take liberties 与 artistic license 在创作自由上接近。

antonyms.example_sentence: The prohibition on public gatherings was lifted.
antonyms.example_translation: 公共集会禁令被解除。
antonyms.difference_note: prohibition 与 license 的许可相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The license includes restrictions on commercial use.
antonyms.example_translation: 许可证包含商业使用限制。
antonyms.difference_note: restriction 限制许可范围。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The novel was criticized as licentious by conservative readers.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这部小说被保守读者批评为放纵。
confusable_words.difference_note: licentious 与 license 同源，但表示放纵无节制。

extension.root_affix: lic-/license 与“允许”有关。license 的核心是被允许越过某种限制。

word_family.note: 同源但语气负面，表示不受约束。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: license 已覆盖执照/许可和艺术自由两义，并把 artistic license 放在 usage 而非派生层。
issues_found: 旧释义只偏文学艺术义

加入 licentious 词族辨析

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. — ifith; 谦恭 a modest or low view of one's own importance; humbleness: We come nearest to the great when we are great in humility. 当我们是最为谦卑的时候 ， 便是我们最接近伟大的时候 。 2X44) modesty

headline.core_en: a modest view of one's own importance

familiar_bridge.summary: humble 是“谦逊的”，humility 是这种品质本身：知道自己有限，不把自己看得过高。

core.main: humility 不是自卑，而是对自己的能力、地位和知识保持适度认识，因此愿意学习、承认错误。

senses.label: 谦逊
senses.text: 不自大，愿意承认局限和学习。

usage_groups.group_title: 承认自身有限而保持谦逊
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 有能力但不自大，能承认错误或向他人学习。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 人物品质、领导力、科学态度、道德评论。

examples.sentence: Good scientists need intellectual humility because evidence can overturn their favorite theories.
examples.translation: 优秀科学家需要理智上的谦逊，因为证据可能推翻他们最喜欢的理论。
examples.teaching_note: intellectual humility 是学术语境很自然的表达。

examples.sentence: Her apology showed humility rather than weakness.
examples.translation: 她的道歉显示的是谦逊，而不是软弱。
examples.teaching_note: humility 不等于自卑或无能。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: His modesty made his achievements seem even more impressive.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他的谦逊让他的成就显得更令人敬佩。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: modesty 与 humility 接近，modesty 更常指不炫耀。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Her self-effacement sometimes kept others from noticing her contributions.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 她的谦抑有时让别人没有注意到她的贡献。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: self-effacement 更强调把自己放低。

antonyms.example_sentence: His arrogance prevented him from listening to advice.
antonyms.example_translation: 他的傲慢让他听不进建议。
antonyms.difference_note: arrogance 是 humility 的直接反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: The leader's hubris led to disastrous decisions.
antonyms.example_translation: 领导者的狂妄导致灾难性决策。
antonyms.difference_note: hubris 更书面，常指导致失败的傲慢。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The public defeat was a humiliation for the team.
confusable_words.example_translation: 公开失败对这个团队是一种羞辱。
confusable_words.difference_note: humility 是美德；humiliation 是被羞辱的经历。

extension.root_affix: humil- 有“低、低下”的历史意象。humility 是把自我位置放低，但不是贬低自己。

word_family.note: 同根但意义转向让人低下、丢脸。
名词形式，需与 humility 区分。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: humility 已区分 humility/humiliation/humble/humiliate，并强调谦逊不是自卑。

revision_actions: 重写 headline 和 usage_tree
补充 intellectual humility 和 hubris 反义

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 枯燥无味的 not interesting or exciting: insipid conversation 枯燥无味的谈话 | I used to find him insipid. 过去我觉得他缺乏风趣

headline.core_en: dull, lacking flavor, interest, or force

familiar_bridge.summary: tasty 是“有味道”，interesting 是“有趣”。insipid 可以说食物淡，也可以说文章、电影、观点没劲。

core.main: insipid 的底层感觉是“没有味道”，后来延伸为内容缺少活力、个性或吸引力。

senses.label: 淡而无味
senses.text: 食物或饮料缺少味道。

senses.label: 乏味无趣
senses.text: 作品、谈话、想法或人物缺少吸引力。

usage_groups.group_title: 食物或饮品没有味道
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 味道淡、缺少鲜明口感。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 食物、饮料、汤、菜肴。

examples.sentence: The soup was warm but insipid, with almost no seasoning.
examples.translation: 汤是热的，但淡而无味，几乎没有调味。
examples.teaching_note: 这是 insipid 的字面味觉义。

usage_groups.group_title: 文章、谈话或作品缺少活力
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 内容平淡，没有个性或吸引力。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 文学评论、电影、演讲、观点、人物描写。

examples.sentence: The novel's plot is lively, but its main character remains strangely insipid.
examples.translation: 这部小说情节很活跃，但主角却奇怪地乏味。
examples.teaching_note: 评价作品时，insipid 常指缺少生命力。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The lecture was accurate but dull.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 讲座内容准确，但枯燥。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: dull 很常用；insipid 更有“淡而无味”的比喻感。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The sauce was bland despite its bright color.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 酱汁颜色鲜亮，但味道平淡。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: bland 可指味道或风格太温和；insipid 更贬义。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The interview was filled with vapid comments.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 采访里充满了空洞乏味的评论。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: vapid 更强调思想空洞。

antonyms.example_sentence: The discussion became lively after the first question.
antonyms.example_translation: 第一个问题后，讨论变得活跃起来。
antonyms.difference_note: lively 与 insipid 的缺乏活力相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The stew was rich and flavorful.
antonyms.example_translation: 炖菜浓郁有味。
antonyms.difference_note: flavorful 对应味觉义。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The critic praised the dish as sapid and balanced.
confusable_words.example_translation: 评论家称赞这道菜有味且均衡。
confusable_words.difference_note: sapid 是 insipid 的词根对照词，但较少见。

extension.root_affix: in- 表示否定；sapid 表示“有味道的”。insipid 就是“没有味道”，再引申为乏味。

word_family.note: 帮助理解 -sipid/-sapid 的味觉来源。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: insipid 已按味觉和抽象乏味双义处理，并补足 sapid 词根网络。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 错综复杂的 having a lot of different parts and small details that fit together: A detective story usually has an intricate plot. 侦探小说通常有错综复杂的情节 。 i X44) convoluted 派生 intricacy /mtrtkesry n. 错综复杂 the quality of being intricate: These improvements increase the intricacy of the mechanisms. 这些改进使机械装置更为机巧灵活 。 i X34) complexity, complex

headline.core_cn: 错综复杂的；精细复杂的
headline.core_en: having many small parts or details arranged in a complicated way

familiar_bridge.summary: complex 是“复杂”，intricate 更像许多细小部分缠在一起，既复杂又精细。

core.main: intricate 常形容图案、结构、机制、论证或关系网有许多相互连接的细节。

senses.label: 精细复杂
senses.text: 很多小部分相互连接，难以一下看清。

usage_groups.group_title: 结构、图案或关系网细节繁多
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 许多部分彼此连接，形成复杂整体。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 设计、机制、论证、关系、计划、图案。

examples.sentence: The rug's intricate pattern took months to weave.
examples.translation: 这块地毯精细复杂的图案花了数月才织成。
examples.teaching_note: intricate pattern 强调细节多且交织。

examples.sentence: The article traces the intricate relationship between trade, migration, and urban growth.
examples.translation: 文章追溯了贸易、迁移和城市增长之间错综复杂的关系。
examples.teaching_note: 抽象关系也可以用 intricate。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The problem is more complex than it appears.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个问题比看起来更复杂。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: complex 范围广；intricate 更强调细节精细、相互缠绕。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The ceremony followed an elaborate set of rules.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 仪式遵循一套复杂精细的规则。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: elaborate 强调精心安排；intricate 强调内部细节交织。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The explanation was too convoluted to follow.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 解释太绕，难以跟上。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: convoluted 常贬义，指复杂到难懂。

antonyms.example_sentence: The device has a simple design.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个装置设计简单。
antonyms.difference_note: simple 与 intricate 的细节复杂相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The instructions are straightforward.
antonyms.example_translation: 说明很直接明了。
antonyms.difference_note: straightforward 强调不复杂、不绕。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The material has intrinsic value.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这种材料有内在价值。
confusable_words.difference_note: intrinsic 与 intricate 形近，但表示内在属性。

word_family.meaning_cn: 复杂精细之处；错综复杂

related_words.note: 相近但更强调设计安排。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: intricate 已突出精细交织的复杂性，和 complex/convoluted/intrinsic 区分。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 精细的; 复杂的; 精心制作的 involving many carefully arranged parts or details; detailed and complicated in design and planning: elaborate designs 精细的设计

headline.core_en: carefully detailed and complicated; to explain in more detail

familiar_bridge.summary: labor 是“劳动”，elaborate 带有花了很多功夫把细节做出来的感觉；作动词时是“展开说明”。

core.main: elaborate 作形容词时强调设计或计划细节多、安排精心；作动词时表示进一步解释、详述。

senses.label: 精心复杂的
senses.text: 有许多细节，经过周密设计或安排。

senses.label: 详述；展开说明
senses.text: 把简略说法补充得更详细。

usage_groups.group_title: 设计、计划或仪式细节很多
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 复杂而经过精心安排。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 设计、计划、装饰、仪式、解释系统。

examples.sentence: The palace is famous for its elaborate ceiling designs.
examples.translation: 这座宫殿以精细复杂的天花板设计闻名。
examples.teaching_note: elaborate design 强调细节多且精心制作。

usage_groups.group_title: 把观点或解释说得更详细
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 在已有说法基础上补充细节。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 回答问题、写作、讲解、学术讨论。

examples.sentence: The professor asked the student to elaborate on her argument.
examples.translation: 教授要求学生进一步阐述她的论点。
examples.teaching_note: elaborate on 是动词义最常见结构。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The report gives a detailed account of the experiment.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 报告详细描述了实验。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: detailed 强调细节多；elaborate 还强调设计精心或复杂。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The map shows an intricate network of canals.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 地图显示了错综复杂的运河网络。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: intricate 强调细节交织；elaborate 强调经过精心安排。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The essay expounds a theory of moral responsibility.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 文章阐述了一种道德责任理论。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: expound 对应 elaborate 的动词义，更正式。

antonyms.example_sentence: The solution was surprisingly simple.
antonyms.example_translation: 解决办法出奇地简单。
antonyms.difference_note: simple 与 elaborate 的复杂精细相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The speaker gave a brief answer.
antonyms.example_translation: 演讲者给了简短回答。
antonyms.difference_note: brief 与 elaborate on 的详述相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The classification process was laborious.
confusable_words.example_translation: 分类过程很费力。
confusable_words.difference_note: laborious 强调费力；elaborate 强调细节和精心安排。

extension.root_affix: labor 与“劳动、功夫”有关；elaborate 可理解为“花工夫加工出细节”。

related_words.note: 帮助记住 elaborate 的“花功夫”感觉。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: elaborate 已按形容词和动词双义处理，且和 intricate/laborious 区分。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 迎风的; 暴露在大风中的 (of a place) exposed to strong winds: the windswept mountaintops 风大的山顶

headline.core_en: exposed to strong winds, often looking bare or rugged

familiar_bridge.summary: wind 是风，swept 是 sweep 的过去分词，有“扫过”的画面；windswept 就像被风反复扫过。

core.main: windswept 常形容海岸、山坡、平原或头发，被强风吹得无遮蔽、凌乱或粗犷。

senses.label: 受风吹的；无遮蔽的
senses.text: 地点或外表长期暴露在风中。

usage_groups.group_title: 地点暴露在强风中
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 没有遮挡，常显得荒凉、粗犷或开阔。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 海岸、山脊、岛屿、荒原、草地。

examples.sentence: The village sits on a windswept coast facing the Atlantic.
examples.translation: 这个村庄坐落在面向大西洋、强风吹拂的海岸上。
examples.teaching_note: windswept coast/hill/plain 常用于自然景观描写。

usage_groups.group_title: 头发或外表被风吹乱
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 风吹后显得凌乱或自然。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 人物外貌描写、摄影、叙事。

examples.sentence: She arrived with windswept hair after cycling across the bridge.
examples.translation: 她骑车过桥后到达，头发被风吹得有些凌乱。
examples.teaching_note: windswept hair 用来描写被风吹乱后的外貌。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: It was a windy day on the coast.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 海岸那天风很大。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: windy 只是有风；windswept 强调被风长期吹拂后的状态。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The exposed ridge offered little protection from the storm.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 无遮蔽的山脊几乎不能抵挡风暴。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: exposed 强调没有遮挡。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The landscape looked bleak in winter.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 冬天景观看起来荒凉。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: bleak 是情绪和景观上的荒凉，windswept 是风造成的暴露感。

antonyms.example_sentence: The garden is sheltered from strong winds.
antonyms.example_translation: 花园避开了强风。
antonyms.difference_note: sheltered 与 windswept 的暴露在风中相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The floor had been swept clean.
confusable_words.example_translation: 地板已经被扫干净。
confusable_words.difference_note: swept 是 sweep 的过去分词；windswept 特指被风吹过的状态。

extension.root_affix: wind + swept 组成复合词，画面是“被风扫过”。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: windswept 的复合词画面自然，地点和外貌两组语境分明。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: phr.v. 排除 … 的可能性 exclude something as a possibility: The doctor ruled out appendicitis. 医生排除了阑尾炎的可能性

headline.core_en: to decide that something is impossible or not worth considering

familiar_bridge.summary: rule 可以是“裁定”。rule something out 就像在判断后把一个可能性划出选项范围。

core.main: rule out 常用于排除可能性、解释、方案或诊断，强调经过判断后不再考虑。

senses.label: 排除可能性
senses.text: 认定某事不可能、不合适或不应继续考虑。

usage_groups.group_title: 排除某种可能性、解释或方案
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 判断后把某个选项从考虑范围中拿掉。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 医学诊断、研究解释、政策选择、调查推理。

examples.sentence: The doctor ordered another test to rule out infection.
examples.translation: 医生又安排了一项检查，以排除感染的可能。
examples.teaching_note: 医学语境中 rule out disease/infection 很常见。

examples.sentence: The evidence does not rule out the possibility of human error.
examples.translation: 这些证据并不能排除人为错误的可能性。
examples.teaching_note: not rule out the possibility of... 是阅读中很常见的谨慎表达。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The study excluded patients with severe heart disease.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 研究排除了患有严重心脏病的患者。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: exclude 范围广；rule out 更强调通过判断排除可能性。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The experiment eliminated one possible cause of the error.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 实验排除了一种可能的错误原因。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: eliminate 可指彻底去掉；rule out 是从推理或选择中排除。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The researchers discounted chance as an explanation.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 研究者不再把偶然性作为解释。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: discount 在论证中可表示认为某解释不重要或不成立。

antonyms.example_sentence: The committee will consider several alternatives.
antonyms.example_translation: 委员会将考虑几种替代方案。
antonyms.difference_note: consider 是把选项纳入考虑。

antonyms.example_sentence: The report includes several possible explanations.
antonyms.example_translation: 报告包括几种可能解释。
antonyms.difference_note: include 与 rule out 的排除相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The dynasty ruled over the region for centuries.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这个王朝统治该地区数百年。
confusable_words.difference_note: rule over 是统治；rule out 是排除可能性。

extension.root_affix: rule 在这里保留“裁定、判断”的感觉；out 表示把选项排出考虑范围。

word_family.note: 与 rule 的裁定义相关。
法律或组织语境中常见。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 笨重的 difficult to carry or move because of its size, shape, or weight: a large, unwieldy box 又大又重的箱子 i 444] cumbersome

headline.core_en: difficult to move, use, or manage because of size, complexity, or awkwardness

familiar_bridge.summary: wield 是“使用、操控”，unwieldy 就是不好拿、不好用，或者复杂到不好管理。

core.main: unwieldy 既可形容物体太大太笨重，也可形容制度、计划或句子太复杂而难以处理。

senses.label: 笨重难移动
senses.text: 因为大小、形状或重量而不好搬动或使用。

senses.label: 复杂难管理
senses.text: 因为结构庞杂而不好操作、管理或理解。

usage_groups.group_title: 物体太大或太笨重
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 尺寸、重量或形状让使用和移动变困难。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 工具、机器、家具、包裹、设备。

examples.sentence: The old camera was too unwieldy for field research.
examples.translation: 这台旧相机太笨重，不适合实地研究。
examples.teaching_note: unwieldy 强调不好携带或操作。

usage_groups.group_title: 制度、计划或文字复杂难处理
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 结构太庞杂，难以管理或理解。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 组织、法律、计划、句子、系统。

examples.sentence: The committee created an unwieldy system that no one could administer efficiently.
examples.translation: 委员会建立了一个庞杂难用、无人能高效管理的系统。
examples.teaching_note: 抽象语境中，unwieldy 常批评系统太复杂。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The box was awkward to carry.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个箱子不好搬。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: awkward 可指动作或情况尴尬；unwieldy 更强调不好操控。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The old procedure was cumbersome and slow.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 旧流程繁琐而缓慢。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: cumbersome 与 unwieldy 很近，常形容流程或设备难用。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The tool's clumsy design made precise work difficult.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个工具笨拙的设计让精细工作变难。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: clumsy 可指人或设计笨拙；unwieldy 更偏难以操控。

antonyms.example_sentence: The project became manageable after it was divided into stages.
antonyms.example_translation: 项目分阶段后变得可管理。
antonyms.difference_note: manageable 与 unwieldy 的难处理相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The device is compact enough to fit in a pocket.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个设备足够紧凑，可以放进口袋。
antonyms.difference_note: compact 与笨重庞大的物体相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The ruler wielded great power.
confusable_words.example_translation: 统治者掌握巨大权力。
confusable_words.difference_note: wield 是动词；unwieldy 是不好使用或管理的形容词。

extension.root_affix: un- 表示否定；wield 表示“使用、操控”。unwieldy 就是“不好操控的”。

word_family.note: 少见，但可帮助理解 unwieldy 的反向。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: unwieldy 已按物理和抽象两层处理，并以 wield 建立构词记忆。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 实实在在的; 确凿的; 明确的 clear and definite; real: tangible benefits 实实在在的好处近义词 palpable 派生 intangible /m'tand5sbl/ adj. 不明确的; 模糊的; 不易理解的 difficult or impossible to define or understand; vague and abstract: intangible ideas 模糊的想法 | The menace was intangible and evasive. 这种威胁捉摸不定 ， 时隐时现 。 2344] impalpable

headline.core_cn: 有形的；实在的；明确可感的
headline.core_en: real and concrete enough to be touched, measured, or clearly noticed

familiar_bridge.summary: touch 是“触摸”，tangible 最早就和“能摸到”有关；后来也表示好处、证据、成果很实在。

core.main: tangible 强调不是抽象承诺或模糊感觉，而是能看见、感到、衡量或证明的实在东西。

senses.label: 有形的
senses.text: 可以触摸或实际存在。

senses.label: 实在明确的
senses.text: 成果、好处或证据具体可见。

usage_groups.group_title: 东西有形、可触摸
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是抽象概念，而是实际存在的物体。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 资产、物品、证据、考古发现。

examples.sentence: The museum displays tangible evidence of the city's early trade.
examples.translation: 博物馆展示了这座城市早期贸易的实物证据。
examples.teaching_note: tangible evidence 指看得见、摸得着或可检验的证据。

usage_groups.group_title: 成果或好处具体可见
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是口号，而是能感受到的实际结果。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政策、改革、项目、治疗、教育。

examples.sentence: The program produced tangible benefits for low-income families.
examples.translation: 这个项目为低收入家庭带来了实实在在的好处。
examples.teaching_note: tangible benefits 是高频搭配，强调实际可感。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The plan produced real improvements.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这个计划带来了真实改善。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: real 很普通；tangible 强调具体可感。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The committee asked for concrete evidence.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 委员会要求具体证据。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: concrete 与 tangible 很近，强调非抽象。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: There was palpable tension in the room.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 房间里的紧张气氛明显可感。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: palpable 强调强烈到几乎能感到。

antonyms.example_sentence: Trust is an intangible asset.
antonyms.example_translation: 信任是一种无形资产。
antonyms.difference_note: intangible 是 tangible 的直接反义。

antonyms.example_sentence: The theory remained abstract until tested in practice.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个理论在实践检验前仍然很抽象。
antonyms.difference_note: abstract 与具体可感相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: His comment was interesting but tangential to the main issue.
confusable_words.example_translation: 他的评论有趣，但偏离了主题。
confusable_words.difference_note: tangential 形近但表示离题或切线关系。

extension.root_affix: tang- 与“触摸”有关；-ible 表示“能够……的”。tangible 可理解为“能被触及的”。

word_family.note: 加 in- 后表示不能触摸或不容易具体衡量。

related_words.note: 帮助理解 tang- 的触觉来源。
同样带有“可感知”的方向。
形近易混，但不是 tangible 的近义词。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: tangible 已重写为有形和实在成果两义；词族需要在合并前清理拼写占位。

source.raw_ocr_text: vt， 严厉批评; 痛斥 to attack or criticize someone very severely, especially in public: He has been much lambasted for his ideas. 他的思想一直受到猛烈择击 。 也作 lambast #5044 denounce

headline.core_en: to criticize someone or something very severely

familiar_bridge.summary: criticize 是“批评”，lambaste 更强，是公开、猛烈、毫不留情地批评。

core.main: lambaste 常用于媒体、政治、评论语境，表示对政策、人物、作品或决定进行猛烈抨击。

senses.label: 痛斥；严厉批评
senses.text: 用强烈语言攻击某人或某事。

usage_groups.group_title: 公开猛烈批评某人或某事
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 批评强度很高，通常带愤怒或不满。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 新闻、政治评论、书评、公众回应。

examples.sentence: The senator lambasted the agency for ignoring safety warnings.
examples.translation: 参议员痛斥该机构无视安全警告。
examples.teaching_note: lambaste someone for something 是自然结构。

examples.sentence: Critics lambasted the film as shallow and manipulative.
examples.translation: 评论家痛批这部电影肤浅且操控情绪。
examples.teaching_note: 媒体评论中，lambaste 常表示强烈负面评价。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The report criticized the company for poor oversight.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 报告批评公司监管不力。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: criticize 普通；lambaste 强度更高。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The group denounced the law as unfair.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 该团体谴责这项法律不公。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: denounce 更正式，常带道德或政治谴责。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The judge castigated the officials for negligence.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 法官严厉斥责官员的疏忽。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: castigate 与 lambaste 接近，语气正式。

antonyms.example_sentence: Reviewers praised the novel's structure.
antonyms.example_translation: 评论者赞扬了小说的结构。
antonyms.difference_note: praise 与 lambaste 方向相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The committee commended the volunteers for their work.
antonyms.example_translation: 委员会表彰了志愿者的工作。
antonyms.difference_note: commend 更正式。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The editorial blasted the mayor's decision.
confusable_words.example_translation: 社论猛烈批评了市长的决定。
confusable_words.difference_note: blast 作动词批评时较口语；lambaste 更有书面感。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: lambaste 已围绕公开猛烈批评组织，近义强度清楚。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: ¥47414#X v.t. HEF; 断言; 主张 to affirm in or as if in argument; assert: maintained that the earth is flat 坚持说地球是平的近义词 assert

headline.core_en: to keep something in a state, or to assert something is true

familiar_bridge.summary: maintain 可以理解成“让某种状态持续下去”；在论证里，它也表示“坚持某个说法”。

core.main: maintain 有三个高频方向：维持状态；保养设备或关系；在争论中主张某观点。

senses.label: 维持
senses.text: 保持某种状态、水平或关系。

senses.label: 保养；维护
senses.text: 让设备、建筑或制度正常运行。

senses.label: 主张；坚持认为
senses.text: 在论证中断言某事为真。

usage_groups.group_title: 保持状态或水平不变
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 让某种状态继续存在。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 秩序、平衡、关系、标准、速度。

examples.sentence: The government struggled to maintain public confidence during the crisis.
examples.translation: 危机期间，政府努力维持公众信心。
examples.teaching_note: maintain confidence/order/balance 都是保持状态。

usage_groups.group_title: 保养或维护设备、制度、关系
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 通过持续照管让其正常运转。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 机器、建筑、道路、网站、制度。

examples.sentence: The museum needs more funding to maintain its historic buildings.
examples.translation: 博物馆需要更多资金来维护历史建筑。
examples.teaching_note: maintain buildings/equipment 强调保养维护。

usage_groups.group_title: 在论证中坚持某种说法
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 声称某事为真，并坚持这个立场。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 学术论证、法律辩护、政治声明。

examples.sentence: The author maintains that economic growth alone cannot solve inequality.
examples.translation: 作者主张，仅靠经济增长无法解决不平等。
examples.teaching_note: maintain that 是阅读中常见的“主张”结构。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The wall helps keep the room warm.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 墙壁有助于保持房间温暖。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: keep 更普通；maintain 更正式。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The law aims to preserve historic neighborhoods.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 法律旨在保护历史街区。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: preserve 强调防止消失或受损。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The critic asserts that the ending is deliberately ambiguous.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 评论家断言结尾是故意含糊的。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: assert 对应 maintain 的论证义。

antonyms.example_sentence: The city abandoned the old plan.
antonyms.example_translation: 城市放弃了旧计划。
antonyms.difference_note: abandon 与 maintain 的维持相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The building deteriorated after years of neglect.
antonyms.example_translation: 多年疏于维护后，建筑恶化了。
antonyms.difference_note: neglect 与保养维护义相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The school retained its traditional curriculum.
confusable_words.example_translation: 学校保留了传统课程。
confusable_words.difference_note: retain 是保有不失去；maintain 更强调持续保持或维护。

extension.root_affix: main-/manu 与“手、掌握”有关；tain 与“持有”有关。maintain 的核心是“持续握住、保持”。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: maintain 已覆盖维持、维护、主张三义，避免只按原书 assert 义处理。

补充 maintenance/maintainable

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: v.t. 极为细致地分析; 仔细研究 examine or analyze minutely: parse problems and solutions 细致地分析问题和解决方案

headline.core_en: to analyze something carefully, especially its structure or meaning

familiar_bridge.summary: analyze 是“分析”，parse 更像把句子、数据或问题拆开来看它的结构。

core.main: parse 原本常用于语法分析，现在也可指非常细致地分析语言、数据、问题或选择。

senses.label: 语法解析
senses.text: 分析句子结构和词的功能。

senses.label: 细致分析
senses.text: 把复杂信息拆开理解。

usage_groups.group_title: 分析语言或句子结构
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 拆开句子，看词和结构如何运作。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 语法、语言学、阅读理解、计算机语言处理。

examples.sentence: Students learned to parse long sentences before translating them.
examples.translation: 学生先学习解析长句，再进行翻译。
examples.teaching_note: parse a sentence 是基础语法义。

usage_groups.group_title: 细致拆解复杂信息
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 把问题、数据或论证拆开分析。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政策分析、数据分析、阅读、法律文本、复杂选择。

examples.sentence: The article parses the difference between legal equality and social equality.
examples.translation: 文章细致分析了法律平等与社会平等的区别。
examples.teaching_note: parse 在学术阅读中常表示细读和拆解。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The researchers analyzed the survey results.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 研究者分析了调查结果。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: analyze 范围广；parse 更强调拆结构。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The critic dissects the novel's narrative structure.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 评论家剖析了小说的叙事结构。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: dissect 比 parse 更有“切开细看”的感觉。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The essay deconstructs the myth of perfect objectivity.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 文章解构了完全客观性的神话。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: deconstruct 更偏理论或批评语境。

antonyms.example_sentence: She skimmed the article before class.
antonyms.example_translation: 她课前略读了文章。
antonyms.difference_note: skim 是快速看；parse 是细致拆解。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The phrase appears several times in the passage.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这个短语在文章中出现了几次。
confusable_words.difference_note: phrase 是语言单位；parse 是分析语言结构。

word_family.note: 计算机或语言处理中负责解析的工具。

related_words.note: parse 语言时常分析 syntax。
细致分析方向的近义词。

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: parse 已按语法解析和广义细致分析处理，词族适合现代学习。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 不分场合乱开玩笑的; 态度轻浮的 treating serious issues with deliberately inappropriate humor; flippant: a facetious remark 轻浮到不得体的言论

headline.core_cn: 不合时宜地开玩笑的；轻浮的
headline.core_en: treating serious matters with inappropriate humor

familiar_bridge.summary: funny 是“好笑”，facetious 是在不该开玩笑的时候开玩笑，听起来轻浮、不严肃。

core.main: facetious 批评某人用玩笑处理严肃话题，语气可能显得轻佻或不尊重。

senses.label: 轻浮玩笑的
senses.text: 在严肃场合用不恰当的幽默。

usage_groups.group_title: 严肃话题上不合时宜地开玩笑
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 幽默不合场合，显得轻浮。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 评论发言、回应、文章语气、社交场合。

examples.sentence: His facetious remark about the accident offended the families involved.
examples.translation: 他对事故开的轻浮玩笑冒犯了相关家庭。
examples.teaching_note: facetious remark 常指场合不对的玩笑。

examples.sentence: I am not being facetious when I say the policy needs a complete redesign.
examples.translation: 我说这项政策需要彻底重做，并不是在开玩笑。
examples.teaching_note: not being facetious 常用来说明自己是认真说的。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: He was joking, but no one laughed.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他是在开玩笑，但没人笑。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: joking 中性；facetious 表示玩笑不合时宜。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Her flippant answer made the committee doubt her seriousness.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 她轻率的回答让委员会怀疑她是否认真。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: flippant 与 facetious 很近，强调态度不严肃。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The judge rejected the frivolous complaint.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 法官驳回了这项轻率无聊的投诉。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: frivolous 更广，可指事情本身不严肃。

antonyms.example_sentence: The issue deserves serious discussion.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个问题值得严肃讨论。
antonyms.difference_note: serious 与 facetious 的轻浮玩笑相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The ceremony was solemn and quiet.
antonyms.example_translation: 仪式庄重而安静。
antonyms.difference_note: solemn 更强调庄重气氛。

confusable_words.example_sentence: Her witty reply made the audience laugh.
confusable_words.example_translation: 她机智的回答让观众笑了。
confusable_words.difference_note: witty 通常是褒义；facetious 常是批评。

word_family.meaning_cn: 轻浮地；不合时宜地开玩笑地

related_words.note: 正面幽默，与 facetious 区分。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: facetious 已突出不合时宜的幽默，并与 witty/joking/flippant 区分。

source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 有益的; 有益健康的 favorable to or promoting health or well-being: salubrious habits # % 的习惯 92 insalubrious /,msa'lu:brias/ adj. 〔 气候 、 环境等 ) 不利于健康的; 有损健康的 (especially of a climate or locality) not salubrious; unhealthy: an insalubrious climate 有损健康的气候

headline.core_cn: 有益健康的；健康宜人的
headline.core_en: healthy or promoting health and well-being

familiar_bridge.summary: healthy 是“健康的”，salubrious 更正式，常形容环境、气候或生活条件有益健康。

core.main: salubrious 重点不是医学治疗，而是环境、空气、气候、习惯等对健康有好处。

senses.label: 有益健康的
senses.text: 使身体或生活状态更健康。

usage_groups.group_title: 环境或条件有益健康
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 空气、气候、地点或生活方式让人更健康。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 环境描写、城市规划、生活习惯、气候评价。

examples.sentence: The town became popular because of its salubrious climate and clean water.
examples.translation: 这座小镇因健康宜人的气候和清洁水源而受欢迎。
examples.teaching_note: salubrious climate/air/environment 都强调有益健康。

examples.sentence: The reformers argued that parks would make crowded cities more salubrious.
examples.translation: 改革者认为公园会让拥挤城市更有益健康。
examples.teaching_note: 正式写作中可用于公共健康和城市环境。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: A healthy diet includes fresh vegetables.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 健康饮食包括新鲜蔬菜。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: healthy 最普通；salubrious 更书面，多修饰环境。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The school promotes wholesome activities after class.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 学校提倡课后有益身心的活动。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: wholesome 可指道德或身心健康。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Regular exercise is beneficial to mental health.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 规律锻炼有益心理健康。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: beneficial 范围更广，不限健康。

antonyms.example_sentence: The neighborhood had unhealthy living conditions.
antonyms.example_translation: 这个社区生活条件不健康。
antonyms.difference_note: unhealthy 是基础反义。

antonyms.example_sentence: The workers lived in insalubrious housing.
antonyms.example_translation: 工人住在不卫生的住房里。
antonyms.difference_note: insalubrious 是直接反义，较正式。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The failure had a salutary effect on the team.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这次失败对团队有警醒作用。
confusable_words.difference_note: salutary 可指道德或心理上的有益教训；salubrious 更偏身体健康和环境。

extension.root_affix: salut-/salub- 与“健康、安全”有关。salubrious 的核心是 health-promoting。

word_family.note: 同语义场，常指教训或影响有益。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: salubrious 已补足健康环境语境和 salutary/insalubrious 网络。

source.raw_ocr_text: adj. if $ti%80; 伪善的 making a show of being morally superior to other people: a sanctimonious hypocrite i $i, #14 #F | He had a sanctimonious expression on his face. 他带着一副伪善的表情 。 近义词 preachy

headline.core_en: pretending to be morally better than other people

familiar_bridge.summary: sanct- 和“神圣、圣洁”有关；sanctimonious 是装出道德高尚的样子，好像自己比别人更纯洁。

core.main: sanctimonious 批评某人表面道德高尚，实际是在摆出优越姿态或评判别人。

senses.label: 道貌岸然；伪善
senses.text: 装出道德优越感，令人反感。

usage_groups.group_title: 摆出道德优越的姿态
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是单纯讲道德，而是显得自以为比别人高尚。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 评论政治人物、公众道歉、社交媒体发言、文学人物。

examples.sentence: The senator's sanctimonious speech ignored his own record of corruption.
examples.translation: 这位参议员道貌岸然的演讲无视了他自己的腐败记录。
examples.teaching_note: sanctimonious 常批评道德姿态和实际行为不一致。

examples.sentence: Her advice sounded less helpful than sanctimonious.
examples.translation: 她的建议听起来不像帮助，更像道德说教。
examples.teaching_note: sanctimonious 可形容语气让人觉得被评判。

basic_synonyms.meaning_cn: 自以为是的；自命正义的
basic_synonyms.example_sentence: His self-righteous tone made the apology sound false.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他自以为正义的语气让道歉听起来很假。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: self-righteous 与 sanctimonious 很近，强调自认道德正确。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The article mocks the author's holier-than-thou attitude.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 文章嘲讽了作者自命清高的态度。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: holier-than-thou 更口语，意思非常接近。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The policy was criticized as hypocritical.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这项政策被批评为虚伪。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: hypocritical 强调言行不一；sanctimonious 强调摆道德架子。

antonyms.example_sentence: A humble leader admits mistakes.
antonyms.example_translation: 谦逊的领导者会承认错误。
antonyms.difference_note: humble 与 sanctimonious 的道德优越感相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: Her apology sounded sincere.
antonyms.example_translation: 她的道歉听起来很真诚。
antonyms.difference_note: sincere 与伪善姿态相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The ritual sanctified the space.
confusable_words.example_translation: 仪式使这个空间神圣化。
confusable_words.difference_note: sanctified 与宗教神圣有关；sanctimonious 是贬义的道德姿态。

extension.root_affix: sanct- 表示“神圣”。sanctimonious 的贬义来自“装得很神圣、很道德”。

word_family.note: 同根动词，语气不一定贬义。

source.raw_ocr_text: v.t. 提供; 提出 to present for acceptance; tender, offer: proffer a cigarette to one's friend 向朋友递上一支烟 | He proffered to lend mea bike. 他提出愿意借给我一辆自行车

headline.core_en: to offer something for acceptance

familiar_bridge.summary: offer 是“提供”，proffer 更正式，常表示把建议、帮助、证据或解释拿出来给对方接受。

core.main: proffer 强调主动拿出某物或某种说法供对方考虑、接受或使用。

senses.label: 提供；提出
senses.text: 正式或主动地给出帮助、建议、解释、证据等。

usage_groups.group_title: 主动提出建议、帮助或解释
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 把某物拿出来供对方接受或判断。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 正式交流、法律、学术、外交、礼貌表达。

examples.sentence: The witness proffered an explanation that the committee found unconvincing.
examples.translation: 证人提出了一个解释，但委员会觉得没有说服力。
examples.teaching_note: proffer an explanation 常见于正式或法律语境。

examples.sentence: Several neighbors proffered help after the storm damaged the house.
examples.translation: 暴风雨损坏房屋后，几位邻居主动提供帮助。
examples.teaching_note: proffer help/assistance 表示主动伸出帮助。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: She offered advice to the new students.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 她向新生提供建议。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: offer 最常用；proffer 更正式、更书面。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The lawyer tendered new evidence to the court.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 律师向法院提交了新证据。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: tender 更法律或正式提交。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The researchers submitted their findings for review.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 研究者提交了研究结果供审查。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: submit 强调提交给权威或程序。

antonyms.example_sentence: The official withheld key documents from investigators.
antonyms.example_translation: 官员没有向调查人员提供关键文件。
antonyms.difference_note: withhold 与 proffer 的主动提供相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: Many students prefer shorter assignments.
confusable_words.example_translation: 许多学生更喜欢较短的作业。
confusable_words.difference_note: prefer 和 proffer 形近，但 prefer 是偏好。

extension.root_affix: pro- 有“向前”的感觉；proffer 的画面是把东西向前递出来。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: proffer 已准确定位为正式 offer，法律/正式语境自然。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: vt， 牢固确立; 使地位稳固 establish (an attitude, habit, or belief) so firmly that change is very difficult or unlikely: These attitudes are deeply entrenched in our culture. 这些态度在我们的社 SRR.

headline.core_en: to establish something so firmly that it is hard to change

familiar_bridge.summary: trench 是“壕沟”。entrench 的画面是把东西埋进防御壕沟里，后来引申为观点、制度或权力变得很难改变。

core.main: entrench 常形容观念、习惯、制度、权力或不平等被固定下来，改变它变得困难。

senses.label: 使根深蒂固
senses.text: 让某种态度、习惯、制度或权力牢固存在。

senses.label: 使防御稳固
senses.text: 军事上指挖壕沟防守，但现代阅读多见比喻义。

usage_groups.group_title: 观念、制度或权力变得难以改变
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 长期固定下来，形成强大惯性。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治、社会制度、偏见、权力结构、习惯。

examples.sentence: The reform failed because it challenged deeply entrenched interests.
examples.translation: 改革失败了，因为它挑战了根深蒂固的既得利益。
examples.teaching_note: entrenched interests 是政治经济语境高频表达。

examples.sentence: The policy unintentionally entrenched existing social inequalities.
examples.translation: 这项政策无意中巩固了既有的社会不平等。
examples.teaching_note: entrench inequality 表示让不平等更难改变。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The school established a new scholarship.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 学校设立了一项新奖学金。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: establish 中性；entrench 强调确立到难以改变。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The law institutionalized unequal access to education.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 法律把教育机会不平等制度化了。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: institutionalize 强调进入制度结构。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The victory cemented his reputation.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 胜利巩固了他的声望。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: cement 比喻把地位或关系固定住。

antonyms.example_sentence: The campaign sought to uproot corruption.
antonyms.example_translation: 这场运动试图根除腐败。
antonyms.difference_note: uproot 与 entrench 的扎根固定相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The new evidence dislodged the old theory.
antonyms.example_translation: 新证据推翻了旧理论。
antonyms.difference_note: dislodge 强调把原本固定的东西移走。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The soldiers dug a trench for protection.
confusable_words.example_translation: 士兵挖壕沟用于防护。
confusable_words.difference_note: trench 是名词；entrench 是使某物牢固固定。

extension.root_affix: en- 表示“使进入某状态”；trench 是“壕沟”。entrench 原本有“用壕沟防御”的画面，后来变成“牢牢固定”。

word_family.meaning_cn: 根深蒂固的；牢固确立的

word_family.note: 帮助形成防御固定的画面。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: entrench 已围绕根深蒂固的制度/利益组织，trench 构词自然且不喧宾夺主。

加入 entrenchment/uproot/institutionalize

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. {£VEA; {#45 having or showing a stubborn and determined intention to do as one wants, regardless of the consequences or effects: a willful child 任性的小孩

headline.core_cn: 任性的；故意的；固执己见的
headline.core_en: deliberate or stubbornly doing what one wants

familiar_bridge.summary: will 是“意志”。willful 就是被自己的意志推着走：要么故意做，要么任性地不听劝。

core.main: willful 有两层：行为是故意的，不是偶然；人或态度固执任性，明知后果仍按自己意思来。

senses.label: 故意的
senses.text: 有意识地做某事，尤其是不该做的事。

senses.label: 任性的；固执的
senses.text: 坚持按自己想法行动，不顾后果或他人。

usage_groups.group_title: 明知不该做却故意为之
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 强调有意、故意，不是无心错误。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 法律、纪律、责任判断、错误行为。

examples.sentence: The report described the pollution as willful neglect of safety rules.
examples.translation: 报告把这次污染描述为对安全规则的故意忽视。
examples.teaching_note: willful neglect/violation 强调责任更重。

usage_groups.group_title: 性格或态度任性固执
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不愿听劝，执意按自己的想法做。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 儿童、领导者、人物性格、组织行为。

examples.sentence: The mayor's willful refusal to consult experts worsened the crisis.
examples.translation: 市长任性地拒绝咨询专家，使危机恶化。
examples.teaching_note: willful refusal 既有故意也有固执。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: He was too stubborn to admit the mistake.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他太固执，不愿承认错误。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: stubborn 强调不改变；willful 还常含故意和任性。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The omission was deliberate, not accidental.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个遗漏是故意的，不是偶然的。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: deliberate 对应 willful 的故意义。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The committee remained obstinate despite new evidence.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 尽管有新证据，委员会仍然顽固。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: obstinate 比 stubborn 更正式、更强。

antonyms.example_sentence: The damage was accidental.
antonyms.example_translation: 损坏是无意造成的。
antonyms.difference_note: accidental 与 willful 的故意义相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The agency was compliant with the new rules.
antonyms.example_translation: 该机构遵守了新规定。
antonyms.difference_note: compliant 与任性违抗相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: She was willing to revise the plan.
confusable_words.example_translation: 她愿意修改计划。
confusable_words.difference_note: willing 是愿意；willful 是任性或故意。

extension.root_affix: will 表示意志；-ful 表示充满。willful 就是“被自己的意志占满”。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: willful 已分清故意和任性两义，并修正 OCR 噪音。

需要区分 willing/willful

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: phr. 充其量; 在最好的情况下 taking the most optimistic or favorable view: It's a gloomy outlook at best. 即使最乐观地来看 ， 前景也是暗淡的

headline.core_cn: 充其量；在最好的情况下
headline.core_en: even in the most favorable situation

familiar_bridge.summary: best 是“最好”，at best 的语气常常不是乐观，而是说“就算按最好情况看，也不过如此”。

core.main: at best 常用来降低评价：即使最乐观地看，结果也有限、不充分或问题仍在。

senses.label: 充其量
senses.text: 表示一个评价已经是最有利估计，但仍不高。

usage_groups.group_title: 把评价限制在最高也不过如此
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 即使最乐观地看，也只能达到某个有限程度。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 批评证据、方案、结果、解释或表现不足。

examples.sentence: The evidence is, at best, incomplete.
examples.translation: 这些证据充其量也只是不完整。
examples.teaching_note: at best 常带保留和降级评价。

examples.sentence: The proposal is at best a temporary solution to a deeper problem.
examples.translation: 这个提案充其量只是深层问题的临时解决办法。
examples.teaching_note: at best a temporary/partial solution 是阅读中常见批评结构。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The repair will take at most two hours.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 维修最多需要两个小时。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: at most 多用于数量上限；at best 多用于评价上限。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Optimistically, the project may finish by June.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 乐观地说，项目可能六月完成。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: optimistically 可是真乐观；at best 常带“也就这样”的语气。

antonyms.example_sentence: At worst, the delay will cost us a week.
antonyms.example_translation: 最坏情况下，延误会让我们损失一周。
antonyms.difference_note: at worst 是最坏情况。

confusable_words.example_sentence: This is the best answer so far.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这是目前最好的答案。
confusable_words.difference_note: the best 是最高级；at best 是限制性评价。

extension.root_affix: best 是 good 的最高级；at best 把评价限定在“最有利情况”。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: at best 已按限制性评价处理，例句自然，无派生层短语污染。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 有风度; SCHE; #24 4L social superiority as demonstrated by genteel manners, behavior, or appearances: an air of gentility 一副彬彬有礼的样子

headline.core_en: refined manners or the appearance of social superiority

familiar_bridge.summary: genteel 是“彬彬有礼、带点装出来的体面”，gentility 就是这种体面或上流姿态本身。

core.main: gentility 可表示真正的文雅，也常带讽刺：表面维持体面、礼貌和阶层感。

senses.label: 文雅体面
senses.text: 礼貌、精致、有教养的外在表现。

senses.label: 上流姿态
senses.text: 追求或展示社会优越感，有时显得做作。

usage_groups.group_title: 表现出文雅体面或阶层感
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 举止、外表或环境显得有教养、体面。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 人物描写、社会阶层、文学评论、家庭氛围。

examples.sentence: The old house retained an air of gentility despite its peeling paint.
examples.translation: 尽管油漆剥落，这座老房子仍保留着一丝体面文雅。
examples.teaching_note: an air of gentility 表示一种外在气质。

examples.sentence: The novel quietly mocks the family's concern with gentility.
examples.translation: 小说含蓄地嘲讽了这个家庭对体面身份的执着。
examples.teaching_note: gentility 在文学中常带阶层讽刺。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: Her refinement showed in the way she spoke.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 她的谈吐显出文雅。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: refinement 更正面；gentility 可带阶层姿态或讽刺。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The ceremony required strict decorum.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 仪式要求严格礼仪。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: decorum 强调合乎礼节。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The family valued respectability above wealth.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这个家庭把体面看得比财富更重要。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: respectability 强调社会认可和体面。

antonyms.example_sentence: The critic attacked the vulgarity of the advertisement.
antonyms.example_translation: 评论家批评广告的粗俗。
antonyms.difference_note: vulgarity 与 gentility 的文雅相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The coarseness of his jokes shocked the guests.
antonyms.example_translation: 他笑话的粗俗让客人震惊。
antonyms.difference_note: coarseness 强调粗鲁不雅。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The local gentry supported the church.
confusable_words.example_translation: 当地乡绅支持教会。
confusable_words.difference_note: gentry 是社会群体；gentility 是体面文雅或上流姿态。

extension.root_affix: gent- 与“出身、绅士、体面”语义有关。gentility 保留了礼貌和阶层感。

word_family.meaning_cn: 彬彬有礼的；假装高雅的

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: gentility 已处理文雅和阶层讽刺两面，与 genteel/gentry 衔接自然。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: vt. 使慌张; 使不知所措 make (someone) agitated or confused: Don't fluster me! 别扰得我心神不宁 ! i544 unsettle, agitate

headline.core_en: to make someone nervous, confused, or unable to think clearly

familiar_bridge.summary: nervous 是“紧张”，fluster 更像突然被打乱节奏，脑子和动作都乱了。

core.main: fluster 通常表示某个突发问题、提问或压力让人慌乱，暂时失去冷静和条理。

senses.label: 使慌乱
senses.text: 让人紧张困惑，不知如何反应。

senses.label: 慌乱状态
senses.text: 作名词时可指一阵慌张。

usage_groups.group_title: 突发压力让人慌乱
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 本来可以思考，但被压力打乱。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 面试、考试、公开发言、突然提问、紧急情况。

examples.sentence: The unexpected question flustered the speaker for a moment.
examples.translation: 这个意外问题让演讲者一时慌乱。
examples.teaching_note: fluster someone 表示让人突然失去镇定。

examples.sentence: She looked flustered but quickly recovered her composure.
examples.translation: 她看起来有些慌张，但很快恢复了镇定。
examples.teaching_note: fluster 常和 composure 形成对照。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The complicated instructions confused many students.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 复杂说明让许多学生困惑。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: confuse 主要是理解混乱；fluster 还包含紧张慌乱。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The sudden silence disconcerted the speaker.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 突然的沉默让演讲者不安。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: disconcert 更正式，强调被扰乱镇定。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The hostile questions rattled the candidate.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 敌意提问让候选人慌了。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: rattle 更口语，常指被吓到或乱了阵脚。

antonyms.example_sentence: A few deep breaths calmed her before the interview.
antonyms.example_translation: 面试前几次深呼吸让她平静下来。
antonyms.difference_note: calm 与 fluster 的慌乱相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: He paused to compose himself.
antonyms.example_translation: 他停下来让自己镇定。
antonyms.difference_note: compose oneself 表示恢复镇定。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The curtains fluttered in the wind.
confusable_words.example_translation: 窗帘在风中飘动。
confusable_words.difference_note: flutter 是轻颤或飘动；fluster 是慌乱。

related_words.note: 反向搭配常用于说明 fluster 后恢复镇定。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: fluster 已突出突发压力导致慌乱，并区分 confuse/flutter。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 过量; 过度 an excessive amount of something: a surfeit of grievances 过多的牢骚 i 44) glut, plethora

headline.core_cn: 过量；过度供给；因过量而厌腻
headline.core_en: an excessive amount, or to give/consume too much

familiar_bridge.summary: too much 是“太多”，surfeit 更正式，强调多到过量、令人厌倦或造成负担。

core.main: surfeit 可作名词表示过量，也可作动词表示让人因过量而厌腻。对象常是食物、信息、选择、娱乐或奢侈品。

senses.label: 过量
senses.text: 数量超过需要或适度范围。

senses.label: 使厌腻
senses.text: 因为得到太多而失去兴趣或感到不适。

usage_groups.group_title: 数量过多到形成负担
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不是丰富，而是过量。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 信息、选择、食物、娱乐、商品。

examples.sentence: Readers face a surfeit of information but often lack reliable guidance.
examples.translation: 读者面对过量信息，却常常缺少可靠指引。
examples.teaching_note: a surfeit of information 是现代语境中很自然的用法。

examples.sentence: The festival offered a surfeit of food, music, and spectacle.
examples.translation: 这个节日提供了过量的食物、音乐和景观。
examples.teaching_note: surfeit 常带“多到过头”的评价。

usage_groups.group_title: 因过量而感到厌腻
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 吃、看或享受太多后反而失去兴趣。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 饮食、娱乐、奢侈、感官享受。

examples.sentence: After a week of formal dinners, the guests were surfeited with rich food.
examples.translation: 一周正式晚宴后，客人们对丰盛食物感到厌腻。
examples.teaching_note: be surfeited with 表示因过量而腻烦。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: Excess sugar can harm health.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 过量糖分会损害健康。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: excess 更常用；surfeit 更书面，常带厌腻感。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: A glut of cheap imports hurt local producers.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 廉价进口商品过剩伤害了本地生产者。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: glut 常用于市场供应过剩。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The report lists a plethora of minor problems.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 报告列出了一大堆小问题。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: plethora 表示多到过量，常书面。

antonyms.example_sentence: Water scarcity shaped the region's economy.
antonyms.example_translation: 水资源稀缺塑造了该地区经济。
antonyms.difference_note: scarcity 与 surfeit 的过量相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The city faced a shortage of nurses.
antonyms.example_translation: 城市面临护士短缺。
antonyms.difference_note: shortage 强调供应不足。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The farm produced a surplus of grain.
confusable_words.example_translation: 农场生产了粮食盈余。
confusable_words.difference_note: surplus 不一定负面；surfeit 常表示过量到不适。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: surfeit 已分清过量和厌腻两个意象，搭配自然。

revision_actions: 补充 a surfeit of / be surfeited with
加入 glut/plethora/scarcity

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. (UR, LSA) 暂停;暂时平息; 暂时平静 a quiet period between times of activity: a lull in the ground fighting 地面战斗的暂时停止 | the early morning lull in urban noise 清晨城 is Pes Dl PBS if 4A respite, relief

headline.core_cn: 暂时平静；使放松警惕；哄睡
headline.core_en: a temporary quiet period, or to make someone feel calm or less alert

familiar_bridge.summary: lull 的声音本身有摇篮曲的感觉：让人安静下来。它既可指活动间的平静，也可指让人放松警惕。

core.main: lull 有两个重要意象：活动暂时减弱形成平静；这种平静可能让人误以为危险过去。

senses.label: 暂时平静
senses.text: 活动、噪音或冲突之间的短暂停顿。

senses.label: 使放松警惕；哄睡
senses.text: 让人平静到不再警惕或入睡。

usage_groups.group_title: 活动或冲突之间的短暂平静
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 紧张或忙碌中出现的临时停顿。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 战争、风暴、谈话、市场、工作节奏。

examples.sentence: During a brief lull in the storm, the crew repaired the roof.
examples.translation: 暴风雨短暂停歇时，工作人员修补了屋顶。
examples.teaching_note: a lull in the storm/fighting 表示活动暂时减弱。

usage_groups.group_title: 平静让人失去警觉
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 让人觉得安全或放松，从而不再防备。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 风险、危机、欺骗、心理状态。

examples.sentence: Early success lulled the team into complacency.
examples.translation: 早期成功让团队放松警惕、变得自满。
examples.teaching_note: lull someone into complacency 是非常重要的比喻结构。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: There was a short pause before he answered.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他回答前短暂停顿了一下。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: pause 是普通暂停；lull 常表示紧张之间的平静。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The ceasefire offered civilians a brief respite.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 停火给平民带来短暂喘息。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: respite 强调从困难中暂时解脱。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The calm after the storm felt strange.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 风暴后的平静显得奇怪。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: calm 是状态；lull 常暗示临时性。

antonyms.example_sentence: A surge of demand overwhelmed the system.
antonyms.example_translation: 需求激增压垮了系统。
antonyms.difference_note: surge 与 lull 的暂时减弱相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The announcement caused a commotion.
antonyms.example_translation: 公告引起一阵骚动。
antonyms.difference_note: commotion 是活动和喧闹。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The mother sang a lullaby to the baby.
confusable_words.example_translation: 母亲给婴儿唱摇篮曲。
confusable_words.difference_note: lullaby 与 lull 同有安抚入睡意象，但它是具体歌曲。

word_family.note: 同意象词，帮助记忆哄睡感。

related_words.note: 和 lull 的暂时平静义接近。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: lull 已覆盖暂时平静和放松警惕两义，lullaby 迁移自然。

revision_actions: 补充 lull into complacency
加入 respite/surge 对照

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 无政府主义者 a person who believes in or tries to bring about anarchy: the anarchist who denies the right of any government 否认政府权力的无政府主义者

headline.core_en: a person who opposes government authority and supports anarchy or voluntary social order

familiar_bridge.summary: anarchy 是“无政府状态”，anarchist 是相信或推动无政府主义的人。

core.main: anarchist 不只是“制造混乱的人”。严格说，它指反对国家强制权力、主张无政府或自愿组织社会的人。

senses.label: 无政府主义者
senses.text: 反对政府权威，支持无政府主义理念的人。

senses.label: 反权威者
senses.text: 有时泛指强烈反对既有权威和制度的人。

usage_groups.group_title: 反对国家权威或强制统治
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 主张社会不应由国家强制控制。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治思想、历史运动、社会理论。

examples.sentence: The historian distinguishes anarchist thinkers from people who simply wanted disorder.
examples.translation: 历史学家区分了无政府主义思想家和单纯想制造混乱的人。
examples.teaching_note: anarchist 在政治思想中有具体含义，不等于 chaos-lover。

usage_groups.group_title: 泛指反权威、反制度的人
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 不愿接受既有规则或等级。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 文学人物、青年文化、社会评论。

examples.sentence: The character's anarchist spirit makes him suspicious of every institution.
examples.translation: 这个人物的反权威精神让他怀疑每一个制度。
examples.teaching_note: 比喻用法中，anarchist 可指反权威气质。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The rebel refused to accept the king's authority.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 反叛者拒绝接受国王的权威。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: rebel 范围广；anarchist 有明确政治思想方向。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The movement attracted anti-authoritarian students.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这场运动吸引了反权威学生。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: anti-authoritarian 描述反权威态度，不一定是无政府主义。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The government arrested several insurrectionists.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 政府逮捕了几名叛乱者。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: insurrectionist 指参与暴力起义的人，不等同于 anarchist。

antonyms.example_sentence: The authoritarian leader centralized power.
antonyms.example_translation: 威权领导者集中了权力。
antonyms.difference_note: authoritarian 崇尚强权控制，与 anarchist 的反国家权威相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The theorist was criticized as a statist.
antonyms.example_translation: 这位理论家被批评为国家主义者。
antonyms.difference_note: statist 强调国家权力的重要性。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The collapse of the regime led to anarchy.
confusable_words.example_translation: 政权崩溃导致无政府状态。
confusable_words.difference_note: anarchy 是状态或理念；anarchist 是人。

extension.root_affix: an- 表示“无”；arch 与“统治、权威”有关。anarchist 的字面方向是“反对统治权威的人”。

word_family.meaning_cn: 无政府状态；无政府主义

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: anarchist 已避免简单等同混乱制造者，并补足 an-/arch 词根网络。
issues_found: 旧释义过薄
revision_actions: 补充 political ideology 和 metaphorical anti-authority 用法
加入 anarchy/anarchism/hierarchy/monarchy

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 有害的 harmful or destructive: a baneful influence 有害的影响

headline.core_en: harmful or destructive, often in a serious or lasting way

familiar_bridge.summary: harmful 是“有害的”，baneful 更书面，常形容一种影响慢慢造成严重伤害。

core.main: baneful 多修饰 influence、effect、policy、habit 等，强调负面影响深、持续或具有破坏性。

senses.label: 有害的；毁灭性的
senses.text: 造成严重坏影响或破坏。

usage_groups.group_title: 某种影响或力量造成严重伤害
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 危害深、持续，常带书面评价。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 社会影响、政策、习惯、思想、环境因素。

examples.sentence: The critic described the ideology's baneful influence on public debate.
examples.translation: 评论家描述了这种意识形态对公共辩论的有害影响。
examples.teaching_note: baneful influence 是最自然的搭配之一。

examples.sentence: The policy had baneful consequences for small farmers.
examples.translation: 这项政策对小农户造成了有害后果。
examples.teaching_note: baneful consequences 强调负面后果严重。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The chemical is harmful to fish.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 这种化学物质对鱼有害。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: harmful 普通；baneful 更书面、更严重。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The article examines the pernicious effects of misinformation.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 文章考察了错误信息的恶性影响。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: pernicious 常指隐蔽而严重的危害。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The drug had deleterious side effects.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这种药有有害副作用。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: deleterious 常用于健康、科学或正式语境。

antonyms.example_sentence: Regular exercise is beneficial to health.
antonyms.example_translation: 规律运动有益健康。
antonyms.difference_note: beneficial 与 baneful 相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The failure had a salutary effect on the team.
antonyms.example_translation: 这次失败对团队有警醒作用。
antonyms.difference_note: salutary 是正式反义方向。

confusable_words.example_sentence: Corruption was the bane of the administration.
confusable_words.example_translation: 腐败是该政府的祸根。
confusable_words.difference_note: bane 是名词；baneful 是形容词。

extension.root_affix: bane 表示“祸根、伤害来源”；-ful 表示“充满”。baneful 就是“充满危害的”。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: baneful 已建立 bane 词根和正式危害语境，近反义充分。

source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 争吵的; 喜欢争吵的; 措辞激烈的 engaged in or addicted to polemics; disputatious: 7 don't like the book's polemical tone. 我不喜欢这本书激烈的语气

headline.core_en: strongly critical or controversial in argument

familiar_bridge.summary: argument 是“论证/争论”，polemical 更像带有战斗性的争论，语言尖锐、立场鲜明。

core.main: polemical 常形容文章、演讲、书或语气带强烈争辩性，目的不只是说明，而是攻击或反驳某立场。

senses.label: 论战性的；激烈争辩的
senses.text: 带有强烈批评、争议和立场对抗。

usage_groups.group_title: 文章或言论带强烈论战性
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 立场尖锐，带攻击或反驳意味。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 政治评论、宗教争论、学术批评、媒体文章。

examples.sentence: The book is more polemical than analytical, attacking its opponents at every turn.
examples.translation: 这本书论战性多于分析性，处处攻击反对者。
examples.teaching_note: polemical 与 analytical 对比时，强调争辩和攻击。

examples.sentence: Her polemical essay forced readers to confront the moral cost of the policy.
examples.translation: 她那篇措辞激烈的文章迫使读者面对该政策的道德代价。
examples.teaching_note: polemical 不一定低质量，但语气通常强烈。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: His argumentative style made the meeting tense.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 他好争辩的风格让会议紧张。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: argumentative 可指爱争辩；polemical 更正式，常指公开文本或言论。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The proposal remains contentious among experts.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 该提案在专家中仍有争议。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: contentious 强调引发争议；polemical 强调表达本身带论战性。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The law was controversial from the beginning.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这项法律从一开始就有争议。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: controversial 是被争议；polemical 是主动参与争辩。

antonyms.example_sentence: The report uses neutral language.
antonyms.example_translation: 报告使用中性语言。
antonyms.difference_note: neutral 与 polemical 的强立场相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The judge gave a dispassionate summary of the evidence.
antonyms.example_translation: 法官对证据作了冷静客观的总结。
antonyms.difference_note: dispassionate 强调不带情绪。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The decision had political consequences.
confusable_words.example_translation: 这个决定有政治后果。
confusable_words.difference_note: political 是关于政治；polemical 是争辩性强。

extension.root_affix: polemic 与“争论、论战”有关；polemical 是其形容词。

word_family.note: 名词形式，也可指强烈批评性文章。

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: polemical 已按论战性文本处理，并补足 polemic/polemicist 网络。

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: n. 僵持; 僵局 a situation in which further action or progress by opposing or competing parties seems impossible: The two leaders remain at a stalemate on crucial issues. 两位领导人在重要问题上仍然相持不下 。 | break the stalemate 打破僵局

headline.core_en: a situation in which no side can make progress or win

familiar_bridge.summary: stalemate 最早是国际象棋里的“和棋僵局”，后来用来形容谈判、战争、政治等双方都推不动。

core.main: stalemate 强调对立双方互相卡住，谁也无法前进、取胜或达成结果。

senses.label: 僵局
senses.text: 双方力量或立场卡住，进展停止。

senses.label: 使陷入僵局
senses.text: 作动词时表示让局面无法推进。

usage_groups.group_title: 谈判、战争或政治陷入僵持
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 双方都不能前进，也不能达成协议。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 谈判、立法、战争、商业竞争、法律纠纷。

examples.sentence: Negotiations reached a stalemate after both sides rejected the compromise.
examples.translation: 双方都拒绝妥协后，谈判陷入僵局。
examples.teaching_note: reach a stalemate 是常见表达。

examples.sentence: A new proposal finally broke the legislative stalemate.
examples.translation: 一项新提案终于打破了立法僵局。
examples.teaching_note: break the stalemate 表示打破僵持。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The talks ended in deadlock.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 谈判以僵局告终。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: deadlock 与 stalemate 很近，常用于谈判或政治。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The committee reached an impasse over funding.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 委员会在资金问题上陷入僵局。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: impasse 更书面，强调没有出路。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Traffic came to a standstill after the accident.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 事故后交通陷入停滞。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: standstill 可指活动停止，不一定有双方对抗。

antonyms.example_sentence: The talks produced a diplomatic breakthrough.
antonyms.example_translation: 谈判产生了外交突破。
antonyms.difference_note: breakthrough 是打破 stalemate 的结果。

antonyms.example_sentence: The agreement brought resolution to the dispute.
antonyms.example_translation: 协议解决了争端。
antonyms.difference_note: resolution 是僵局被解决。

confusable_words.example_sentence: The match ended in checkmate.
confusable_words.example_translation: 比赛以将死结束。
confusable_words.difference_note: checkmate 是一方获胜；stalemate 是无法推进或和棋式僵局。

extension.root_affix: stalemate 来自棋局意象：局面被卡住，无法继续有效行动。

related_words.note: 同是棋局词，但结果不同。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: stalemate 已以棋局意象解释政治谈判僵局，并和 deadlock/impasse/checkmate 区分。

加入 checkmate 易混

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: #84414 n. 工作; 活动; 事业或爱好 an activity that one engages in as a vocation, profession, or avocation; occupation: She enjoys reading, knitting, and other quiet pursuits. 她喜欢读书 、 编织和其他安静的活动

headline.core_cn: 追求；从事的活动；职业或爱好
headline.core_en: the act of seeking something, or an activity that someone regularly does

familiar_bridge.summary: pursue 是“追求、从事”，pursuit 既可以是追求某个目标，也可以指一个人长期投入的活动。

core.main: pursuit 的核心是“持续投入去追某个东西”：可以是知识、幸福、目标，也可以是工作、事业或爱好。

senses.label: 追求某个目标
senses.text: 强调为了得到、理解或实现某事而持续努力。

senses.label: 从事的活动或事业
senses.text: 指一个人长期做的工作、爱好或精神活动。

usage_groups.group_title: 追求目标、知识或理想
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 强调持续努力寻找、获得或实现某个目标。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 学术讨论、人生目标、政治或科学探索。

examples.sentence: The scientist spent decades in pursuit of a more accurate model of climate change.
examples.translation: 这位科学家花了几十年追求一个更准确的气候变化模型。
examples.teaching_note: in pursuit of 强调长期、主动的追求。

usage_groups.group_title: 一个人投入的活动或事业
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 指长期从事的工作、爱好或精神活动。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 职业、爱好、艺术活动、学术事业。

examples.sentence: Reading and music were not mere hobbies but lifelong pursuits for her.
examples.translation: 阅读和音乐对她来说不只是爱好，而是一生投入的追求。
examples.teaching_note: pursuit 在这里指一种长期投入的活动。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The search for a cure continued for years.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 寻找治疗方法的努力持续了多年。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: search 更偏寻找；pursuit 更强调持续追求。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The novel follows a young scholar's quest for truth.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 这部小说讲述一位年轻学者对真理的追寻。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: quest 更有理想化或冒险色彩。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: Scientific endeavor often requires patience and doubt.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 科学事业常常需要耐心和怀疑精神。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: endeavor 更强调努力本身或事业性质。

antonyms.example_sentence: The abandonment of the project disappointed many researchers.
antonyms.example_translation: 项目的放弃让许多研究者失望。
antonyms.difference_note: abandonment 与 pursuit 的持续追求相反。

confusable_words.example_sentence: Teaching was his main occupation for many years.
confusable_words.example_translation: 教学多年来是他的主要职业。
confusable_words.difference_note: occupation 偏职业或占用状态；pursuit 更强调主动投入。

extension.root_affix: pursue 是基础动词，pursuit 是它的名词形式。

word_family.note: 表示执行追求动作的人。

related_words.note: 常用于学术或正式语境。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: adj. 一丝不苟的; 对细节要求高的 showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise: He employed all his customary delicacy, subtlety, and his meticulous nature into the script and the performance. 他将自己一贯敏锐精明以及细致的风格融入到了剧本和表演中 。 | These meticulous rules of conduct have been formed throughout Chinese history. 这些细致入微的行为准则在中国的历史长河中形成 。 近义词 thorough, scrupulous

headline.core_en: extremely careful and attentive to details

familiar_bridge.summary: careful 是“小心”，meticulous 更进一步，强调每个细节都认真检查。

core.main: meticulous 不是普通认真，而是对细节非常敏感，做事精确、周密、几乎不放过小错误。

senses.label: 一丝不苟的
senses.text: 形容人、研究、记录、计划或手工工作非常细致。

usage_groups.group_title: 做事或研究极其细致
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 强调过程周密、细节准确。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 研究、记录、计划、编辑、修复、工艺。

examples.sentence: The historian's meticulous research uncovered errors in the accepted account.
examples.translation: 这位历史学家细致入微的研究发现了既有说法中的错误。
examples.teaching_note: meticulous research 强调证据和细节都认真核查。

examples.sentence: Her meticulous notes made the experiment easy to repeat.
examples.translation: 她一丝不苟的记录让这个实验很容易重复。
examples.teaching_note: meticulous 可形容 notes、records、planning 等。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: A careful reading reveals the author's irony.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 仔细阅读会发现作者的讽刺。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: careful 普通；meticulous 更强调细节层面的周密。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The committee conducted a thorough review of the evidence.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 委员会对证据进行了彻底审查。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: thorough 强调整体完整；meticulous 强调细节精确。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The editor was scrupulous about checking every quotation.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 编辑在核对每一处引文时非常严谨。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: scrupulous 可带道德谨慎感；meticulous 更偏细节。

antonyms.example_sentence: A careless error changed the result of the calculation.
antonyms.example_translation: 一个粗心错误改变了计算结果。
antonyms.difference_note: careless 与 meticulous 的细致相反。

antonyms.example_sentence: The report was rejected because of sloppy reasoning.
antonyms.example_translation: 报告因推理草率而被驳回。
antonyms.difference_note: sloppy 带明显负面评价。

confusable_words.example_sentence: He was fastidious about the arrangement of his desk.
confusable_words.example_translation: 他对书桌摆放非常挑剔。
confusable_words.difference_note: fastidious 更偏挑剔或难以取悦；meticulous 更偏做事细致。

related_words.note: 常和 meticulous 一起用于学术评价。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: meticulous 已围绕细节和精确度组织，例句自然，关系区没有把近义词混成一团。

区分 careful、thorough、scrupulous

source.source_note: Local OCR from split unit PDF; source wording retained where OCR was readable.
source.raw_ocr_text: vt. 使不受束缚;使不受限制 release or free from a tether: The horses are untethered. 这些马被解开了绳子

headline.core_en: to free someone or something from a physical or figurative tie

familiar_bridge.summary: tether 是拴住动物或物体的绳子；untether 就是把这种“拴住”解除，也可比喻摆脱限制。

core.main: untether 的画面是把某物从绳索、装置、制度或旧观念中解放出来，使它可以自由移动或发展。

senses.label: 解除实体束缚
senses.text: 把动物、设备或物体从绳索、线缆、固定点上解开。

senses.label: 摆脱抽象限制
senses.text: 让思想、技术、工作方式或人不再受旧框架约束。

usage_groups.group_title: 从实体束缚中解开
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 解除绳索、线缆或固定装置。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 动物、船只、设备、移动装置。

examples.sentence: The researchers untethered the sensor so it could drift with the current.
examples.translation: 研究人员解开传感器的固定，让它随水流漂动。
examples.teaching_note: 这里是实体意义上的解除固定。

usage_groups.group_title: 摆脱制度或观念限制
usage_groups.meaning_focus: 让某人或某事脱离旧规则、地点或假设的限制。
usage_groups.when_to_use: 技术、工作方式、思想、经济活动。

examples.sentence: Remote tools have untethered many workers from the office.
examples.translation: 远程工具让许多工作者不再被办公室束缚。
examples.teaching_note: 抽象用法中，untether 常表示自由度增加。

basic_synonyms.example_sentence: The new policy freed researchers to share their data.
basic_synonyms.example_translation: 新政策让研究人员可以自由共享数据。
basic_synonyms.difference_note: free 很普通；untether 保留“原来被系住”的画面。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The court released the documents to the public.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 法院向公众公开了这些文件。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: release 更通用；untether 更强调从束缚或固定点中脱离。

advanced_synonyms.example_sentence: The reform liberated artists from strict official rules.
advanced_synonyms.example_translation: 改革让艺术家摆脱了严格的官方规则。
advanced_synonyms.difference_note: liberate 语气更强，常带政治或精神解放感。

antonyms.example_sentence: The boat was tethered to the dock.
antonyms.example_translation: 船被拴在码头上。
antonyms.difference_note: tether 是 untether 的直接反向。

antonyms.example_sentence: Limited data constrained the researchers' conclusions.
antonyms.example_translation: 有限数据限制了研究者的结论。
antonyms.difference_note: constrain 常用于抽象限制。

confusable_words.example_sentence: Detach the cable before moving the machine.
confusable_words.example_translation: 移动机器前先拔掉线缆。
confusable_words.difference_note: detach 强调分离；untether 强调解除束缚后获得自由。

extension.root_affix: un- 表示解除或相反；tether 表示拴住的绳索或限制。

word_family.note: 过去分词和形容词形式。
常作形容词，形容设备、工作方式或思想自由移动。

quality_gate.notes: Merged from a concrete ChatGPT deep-review result; pass requires clean canonical audit.

chatgpt_gate.llm_judgment: untether 已区分实体和抽象两层，构词清楚且没有普通搭配混入派生层。
